title: Web Platform Lead ﻿
description:
Saab is on an important journey.

*As the world changes, the relevance of what we do is becoming even clearer. Demand is growing. Expectations are rising. The need for trust, clarity and strong positioning across markets has never been greater.*

*That is why we are building a marketing and communications team worthy of the journey Saab is on.*


We are now looking for a Web Platform Lead to help build, govern and continuously improve Saab.com, our CMS environment and the related digital services that support Saab’s external digital presence.


This is a role for someone who wants real ownership. Someone who can bring structure to complexity, connect business and communication needs to web platform priorities, and make sure our external web presence is stable, secure, compliant, user-focused and aligned with Saab’s brand and business direction.

### **Your role**


As Web Platform Lead, you will be responsible for the governance, development, operation and continuous improvement of Saab.com, our CMS environment and the related digital services that support Saab’s external digital presence.


You will own and coordinate the roadmap, backlog, governance model and day-to-day operations of Saab’s CMS platform, Optimizely, together with related services and suppliers. You will act as the main link between Group Brand & Marketing, Group IT, external partners and internal stakeholders.


You need to understand technical dependencies well enough to ask the right questions, coordinate development needs and translate business, communication and brand requirements into clear platform priorities.


It is a broad role. You will work across technology, communication, content, brand, security, compliance, suppliers and internal governance. You will need to create clarity where there is complexity, build structure where there is fragmentation and make sure the work moves forward in a way that is both practical and sustainable.


You will report to the Vice President, Global Head of Brand & Marketing and be part of Saab’s Group Brand & Marketing team. You will work closely with colleagues in Sweden and across the organisation, spanning brand strategy, editorial, digital, events, communications, IT and business stakeholders.


At Group level, we are building stronger platforms, clearer frameworks and a more connected way of working across brand, marketing and communications. This role is key to making that work real in our digital environment.


We are moving fast. You need to want to move with us.


What you will do

* own and coordinate the governance, development and operation of Saab.com and Saab’s CMS platform, Optimizely
* manage the web platform roadmap and backlog in an agile or semi-agile way
* create clarity around priorities, dependencies, timelines, decisions and responsibilities
* act as the main point of coordination for platform operations, support and incident management
* work closely with Group IT, suppliers and internal stakeholders to ensure that issues are handled efficiently and risks are escalated when needed
* represent Group Brand & Marketing and Group Communication & Sustainability in relevant IT governance forums and digital projects
* support budget planning, cost follow-up, supplier coordination and approval processes connected to the web platform, domain management and related digital services
* maintain clear documentation of platform architecture, processes, access rights, suppliers, decisions, risks and key stakeholders
* contribute to the continuous improvement of Saab’s external web presence and other prioritised digital brand touchpoints
* help improve structure, user flows, content coordination, testing and optimisation together with content owners, UX, developers, agencies and other stakeholders
* follow how AI-driven tools and automation are reshaping web platform management, content workflows, search, discovery and web experience, and help evaluate relevant opportunities for Saab

### **Your Profile**


You know how to operate in the space between technology, communication and business needs. You are structured enough to bring order to complex systems, but pragmatic enough to keep work moving.


You can hold your own in a discussion about governance, priorities, platform dependencies or supplier delivery, and you can still roll up your sleeves to clarify a requirement, improve a process, document a decision or push an issue over the line.


You are comfortable in complex, matrixed environments and know how to build trust, alignment and momentum across functions, suppliers and seniority levels.


You are service-minded, but you understand that strong platform ownership sometimes means saying no, challenging unclear requests, protecting stability and security, and helping the organisation make better decisions.


Most of all, you are energised by building. You do not need a finished playbook to do good work. You are excited by the opportunity to help shape it.


What you bring

* experience from web platform ownership, web management, digital product ownership, IT coordination or a similar role in a complex organisation
* strong understanding of CMS platforms, preferably Optimizely
* experience managing digital roadmaps, backlogs, priorities and dependencies
* understanding of IT governance, support models and incident management
* experience coordinating suppliers, developers and internal stakeholders
* the ability to translate business and communication needs into clear platform requirements
* strong documentation, governance and process skills
* the ability to manage complexity, prioritise and create structure
* strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* understanding of security, compliance, access management and data/privacy considerations
* experience working in agile or semi-agile digital development environments
* excellent verbal and written communication skills in English


Experience from UX, web production, CMS publishing, accessibility, SEO, analytics, content structure, information architecture or digital optimisation is a strong advantage. Familiarity with AI-powered tools for content, SEO, analytics, search, discovery or platform optimisation is also considered a merit.


Experience from large, decentralised or regulated organisations is also considered a merit.


This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.

### **What you will be part of**


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here.
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: UX Designer
description:
#### **Make an impact with us**


We are now looking for a UX/UI Product Designer to join our product team and contribute to the design of products across our cybersecurity solution portfolio.  

  

This is a role for someone who enjoys the full breadth of UX work, from research and discovery through to UI delivery, and who likes turning complex things into intuitive experiences. You will be working on cybersecurity products spanning identity, access, and secure information exchange, and you should find technically complex domains genuinely interesting.

#### **About the role**


As a UX/UI Designer at Pointsharp, you will work within cross-functional agile teams alongside product managers, product owners, software developers, software architects, QA engineers, and technical writers. You will also collaborate closely with other UX/UI designers within the team.  

  

You will be responsible for the full design process across multiple product areas: conducting user research, developing concepts and prototypes, delivering polished UI, and ensuring quality through design QA and developer handover. Alongside project work, you will contribute to internal initiatives and cross-functional projects.  

  

The role requires genuine curiosity about technically complex products and the ability to turn complex requirements into clear, usable experiences.  

  

This position is based in our Stockholm office, with the flexibility of a hybrid working model.

#### **What you'll do**


Your responsibilities will include:

  

* Conduct user research and collaborate with Product Managers to develop and validate requirements, applying UX methods such as user journey mapping, competitive analysis, persona development, and flow diagrams
* Design new functionality end-to-end, from concept and wireframes through interactive prototypes to final UI
* Redesign and improve existing screens and flows across our product portfolio
* Create accessible designs in line with WCAG 2.2 AA standards
* Contribute to the development and maintenance of our design system, working with reusable components and scalable patterns
* Support delivery teams with design input on operational and product tickets
* Ensure smooth handover to development and conduct design QA on developed functionality
* Participate in internal design initiatives and cross-functional projects
* Apply AI tools to enhance your design workflow, where they add real value to research, ideation, prototyping, or iteration
* Contribute to the design of AI-powered features, thinking through how to make those interactions clear, trustworthy, and useful for end users

#### **What we're looking for**


You bring solid experience as a UX or Product Designer and are confident working across the full design process, from research and problem framing through to polished UI and developer handover. You are comfortable collaborating with a wide range of technical stakeholders and can hold your own in conversations with developers, architects, and product teams.  

  

We believe you have:

  

* Proven experience in UX or product design
* Strong Figma skills, including prototyping and component-based design
* A solid UX foundation: user research, workshop facilitation, information architecture, and interaction design
* Experience working within and contributing to a design system
* Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG 2.2 AA)
* The ability to work across multiple product areas in parallel without losing quality or rigour
* Comfort using AI tools in your design workflow, and experience or genuine interest in designing for AI-powered features and products
* A genuine interest in learning about technically complex domains; security, identity, or enterprise software experience is a plus

Familiarity with Jira and Confluence is a plus  
* 


Please include a portfolio showcasing relevant UX design work as part of your application.#### **About us**


Join an international growth journey in the cybersecurity space at Pointsharp, a European company founded in 2006. We are are shaping the future of identity and access management through intuitive, user-friendly solutions.  

  

You will be part of a collaborative, respectful, and supportive environment where people genuinely care about each other and where different perspectives and experiences are valued. Our culture is rooted in entrepreneurship and strong technical expertise, with short decision paths and real opportunities to influence both solutions and ways of working. At Pointsharp, you’ll work closely with experienced colleagues, continuously develop your skills, and play an active role in building something meaningful together.
  

  

We offer a flexible hybrid work model and a workplace where growth, both personal and professional is encouraged. We warmly welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, including those who may not meet every requirement but are excited to learn and contribute.  

  

Pointsharp — Security made easy
  

  

https://www.pointsharp.com/

title: Verksamhets- och managementkonsult inom fastighet och digitalisering till Stockholm
description:
**Verksamhets- och managementkonsult inom fastighet och digitalisering till Stockholm**
=======================================================================================

*Vill du forma framtidens fastigheter med teknik och digitalisering? På Sweco planerar och utformar vi framtidens samhällen och städer. Nu söker vi en verksamhets- och managementkonsult som vill kombinera fastighetskunnande med PropTech och digital transformation – och göra verklig skillnad hos våra kunder.*

**Varför jobba hos oss?**  

På Swecos division Digital Services arbetar vi i digital framkant för ett smartare och mer hållbart samhälle. Bland dina framtida kollegor finner du GIS- och geodataexperter, BIM-experter, digitaliseringsledare, data- och informationssamordnare, FME-experter och systemutvecklare, UX:are, IT säkerhetsspecialister samt andra IT experter.


Sweco erbjuder en flexibel arbetsplats, där du i hög grad kan påverka arbetet själv, både gällande arbetsupplägg, tid och vart du väljer att arbeta. Vi lägger stor vikt vid att våra medarbetare trivs hos oss och arbetar under hög grad av frihet med coachande och stöttande ledarskap. Vårt mål är att vara en arbetsplats med ständigt lärande och bra utvecklingsmöjligheter internt.

**Vi erbjuder** spännande uppdrag hos ledande aktörer i branschen. Vi har en kultur där nyfikenhet, samarbete och hållbarhet står i centrum. Du blir en del ett sammansvetsat team där vi stöttar, utmanar och lär av varandra.

**Om rollen**  

Som konsult hos oss driver du förändrings- och digitaliseringsuppdrag inom fastighets- och samhällsbyggnadssektorn. Du arbetar nära kund, från strategi och analys till genomförande, där du hjälper organisationer att modernisera sin förvaltning, energieffektivisera och dra nytta av ny teknik.


Du kommer bland annat att:

* Leda och stödja digitaliserings- och PropTech-initiativ hos kund.
* Driva projekt inom energi-, förvaltnings- och verksamhetsutveckling.
* Analysera verksamheter och föreslå konkreta, affärsmässiga lösningar.
* Vara en brygga mellan fastighetsverksamhet, teknik och affär.


Tjänsten är förlagd på heltid. Start enligt överenskommelse och placeringsort i Stockholm, med stor flexibilitet och möjlighet till hybridarbete.  

  

**Den vi söker – är det du?**  

Vi tror att du vill bidra till ett hållbart samhälle genom digitalisering. Du är nyfiken på såväl tekniken som affären och både identifierar, initierar och utvecklar nya affärsmöjligheter.


Samarbete, både mellan kunder och kollegor, värdesätts på Sweco och därför bör du vara kommunikativ, social och engagerad. Innovation och teknisk komplexitet driver dig och du trivs när du får lösa svåra problem med smarta, skalbara lösningar. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap och vill bidra till att Sweco kan leverera hållbara digitala lösningar i teknisk framkant. I ditt arbete tar du stort ägandeskap och strukturerar ditt arbete.  

  

**Vi söker dig som har**

* Flera års erfarenhet inom fastighet, teknisk förvaltning och/eller digitalisering.
* Erfarenhet av projektledning och förändringsarbete.
* God förståelse för PropTech och digitala lösningar inom fastighet.
* Erfarenhet av en ledande eller rådgivande roll inom tech/digitalisering är starkt meriterande.
* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet.


Du uttrycker dig väl på både svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.

**Låter det som du?**  

Annonsen kommer att ligga ute till och med **2026-08-31**. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl utan hänvisar samtliga sökande till ansökningsformuläret. Intervjuer sker löpande och vi återkopplar till samtliga senast efter avslutad rekryteringsprocess. Då det är semestertider kan återkoppling dröja under juli och augusti. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!  

  

**Kontakta oss**  

Vill du höra mer om tjänsten och hur vi jobbar i gruppen? Välkommen att kontakta Jonas Hjelmqvist på jonas.hjelmqvist@sweco.se eller på 073-855 47 50.

  

På Sweco vill vi vara en arbetsplats präglad av mångfald. Vi tror att fler perspektiv breddar vår förmåga att fortsätta nå våra mål och eftersträvar mångfald i våra rekryteringsprocesser.
  

  

Sweco planerar och utformar morgondagens hållbara samhällen och städer. Med den samlade kunskapen hos våra 23 000 arkitekter, ingenjörer och andra experter arbetar vi tillsammans med våra kunder för att möjliggöra den gröna omställningen, maximera digitaliseringens potential och stärka Europas konkurrenskraft och resiliens. Sweco är Europas ledande konsultföretag inom arkitektur och teknik med en omsättning på cirka 32 miljarder SEK under 2025. Företaget är noterat på Nasdaq Stockholm.
company_description: Sweco planerar och utformar framtidens samhällen och städer.

title: Mechanical Engineer - Full-Time
description:
**YOUR MISSION AT VOI**


As a Mechanical Engineer in Voi’s Vehicle HW team, you will play a key role in developing the next generations of our vehicles - from setting requirements and guiding and reviewing suppliers’ end-to-end work including concept design, testing and industrialisation. You will safeguard that the hardware we bring to market is high performing i.e. safe , reliable, great UX, easily repairable and built for scale, together with colleagues across R&D, Quality, Supply Chain and our markets.


In this role you will:

* Lead the end-to-end co-development of next-generation vehicle hardware in close collaboration with suppliers and Voi teams
* Define engineering requirements and specifications, provide feedback on concepts and designs, and review supplier test plans and reports to ensure solutions meet Voi’s performance, reliability and repairability targets.
* Support root cause analysis, and work with suppliers and internal teams to develop robust mitigation and resolution actions - feeding learnings into future hardware generations.
* Design new add-ons and variants in-house, taking full ownership from requirements and drive the project end-to-end including CAD design, sample evaluation, testing, verification and industrialisation.
* Work hands-on with sample builds and mass produced vehicles to assess, design improvements across multiple dimensions including serviceability, UX and operational handling in our workshops and markets.
* Travel regularly (approximately quarterly) to China for a few weeks at a time, as well as to Voi markets in Europe, to work closely with suppliers and support in-field issues.


You will collaborate with a broad set of stakeholders including suppliers’ project managers and engineers, the wider Vehicle HW team (mechanical, electrical, test and certification), Quality, Supply Chain, IoT & SW, Product and local market teams.

**WHAT YOU NEED TO EMBARK**


You are a hands-on mechanical engineer who enjoys owning the full development process and working at the intersection of design, suppliers, testing and operations. You thrive in a scale-up environment, are energised by collaboration and are motivated by seeing your designs roll out on the streets for our customers to use on a daily basis.

* Bachelor’s degree or higher in an engineering discipline, ideally Mechanical Engineering.
* Strong end-to-end experience in mechanical product development, including requirement setting, design, testing and verification, and industrialisation.
* Proven experience working closely with suppliers, ideally Chinese suppliers, on co-development projects.
* Extensive experience with CAD, and solid exposure to CAE and FEA tools, applied throughout the development process.
* Experience conducting hands-on assessments and driving design improvements related to repairability, serviceability and field performance.
* Experience working with DFMEA and PFMEA, and with reliability-focused testing and verification.
* Comfortable collaborating with cross-functional teams such as project managers, electrical engineers, test and verification engineers, Quality, Procurement, Firmware and Supply Chain.
* Excellent problem-solving skills; being data driven and able to work with SQL is a strong plus.
* Strong communication skills, enabling efficient collaboration with suppliers and internal stakeholders.
* Fluency in English, written and spoken; proficiency in Chinese is a plus.
* Ability to manage and prioritise multiple projects simultaneously, including regular international travel.


Don’t meet every requirement? If you are excited about this role and our mission, and have relevant, transferable skills, we encourage you to apply – even if you don’t check every box.

**WHY VOI?**


Working at Voi is more than just a job; our People Promise includes a personal voyage where you will grow as a professional and be a part of a team and culture that builds something meaningful for society. In addition to this you’ll have the opportunity to:

* Join Europe’s #1 micromobility operator and one of the fastest growing scale-ups.
* Get “skin in the game” through our employee options programme.
* Enjoy unlimited free Voi rides and a dog-friendly office.
* Work together with inspiring, motivated and fun colleagues towards a common goal.
* Join the micromobility revolution and be a part of creating sustainable cities made for living, free from noise and pollution.

title: Tech lead webb
description:
#### **Var med och bygg webbupplevelsen som tar Umeå Energi framåt**

##### **Av Umeåborna, för Umeåborna.**


Energibranschen förändras snabbt och kundernas förväntningar på digital service ökar. För många är webben den första kontakten med Umeå Energi - en plats för information, självservice, vägledning och nya digitala tjänster.


Nu söker vi en Tech Lead Webb som vill ta ett ledande tekniskt ansvar för hur vi utvecklar, förbättrar och framtidssäkrar våra webbaserade kundupplevelser.


Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera tekniskt djup med ledarskap, påverkan och möjligheten att skapa lösningar som används av våra kunder varje dag.

### **Din roll**


Som Tech Lead Webb ansvarar du för den tekniska riktningen inom webbutveckling och spelar en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av Umeå Energis digitala kundresor.


Du leder det tekniska arbetet i teamet och hjälper utvecklare att fatta bättre beslut, utvecklas i sin kompetens och bygga hållbara lösningar över tid. Rollen innebär också att du bidrar aktivt i utvecklingen och arbetar nära produktägare, UX, arkitekter och verksamhet.


Du blir en viktig del i hur vi bygger upp en modern, tillgänglig och långsiktigt hållbar webbplattform där kundnytta, användarupplevelse och teknisk kvalitet går hand i hand.


Hos oss handlar rollen lika mycket om människor, samarbete och riktning som om teknik.

#### **Det här blir en stor del av din vardag**

* Leda och coacha utvecklare i teamet i deras tekniska utveckling
* Sätta teknisk riktning för webbutveckling, arkitektur, teknikval och arbetssätt
* Utveckla och vidareutveckla kundnära webbapplikationer och digitala tjänster
* Bidra till hållbara lösningar inom både frontend och backend
* Säkerställa kvalitet, prestanda, säkerhet, tillgänglighet och förvaltningsbarhet i våra webblösningar
* Driva tekniska riktlinjer, kodstandarder och best practices
* Bidra till gemensamma komponenter, återanvändbara lösningar och en långsiktigt hållbar webbplattform
* Arbeta med moderna frontendramverk, API och integrationer mot bakomliggande system
* Samarbeta nära produktägare, UX, arkitekter och verksamhet för att omsätta behov till värdeskapande funktioner
* Bidra till effektiva bygg-, test- och releaseflöden, inklusive CI/CD och automatisering
* Utforska hur AI och nya utvecklingsverktyg kan stärka både utvecklingsarbetet och kundupplevelsen
* Vara en aktiv del i roadmap-planering, tekniska vägval och långsiktig utveckling av webbområdet

### **Vem vi söker**


Vi söker dig som är tekniskt stark, men som också drivs av att hjälpa andra att lyckas.


Du har sannolikt arbetat med webbutveckling under flera år och känner dig trygg i att ta ett senior tekniskt ansvar. Samtidigt är du nyfiken, prestigelös och tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap.


Du trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, produkt och verksamhet. Du förstår att de bästa digitala upplevelserna skapas när teknisk kvalitet kombineras med förståelse för användarens behov och verksamhetens mål.


För dig handlar tekniskt ledarskap inte om att ha alla svar, utan om att skapa förutsättningar för att teamet tillsammans ska fatta bra beslut, utvecklas och leverera lösningar som håller över tid.

### **För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har**

* Många års erfarenhet av modern webbutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att ta ett ledande tekniskt ansvar eller fungera som senior teknisk rådgivare i ett utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av moderna frontendramverk och komponentbaserad utveckling
* Erfarenhet av backendutveckling, API:er och integrationer
* God förståelse för webbarkitektur, API, integrationer och moderna utvecklingsmönster
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD, Git, testautomatisering och moderna utvecklingsmetoder
* Förståelse för säkerhet, prestanda, tillgänglighet och användbarhet i webblösningar
* Erfarenhet av att vägleda, coacha eller stötta andra utvecklare
* Förmåga att omsätta verksamhets- och kundbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar

#### **Det är extra intressant om du har erfarenhet av**

* React, Vue 3 eller andra moderna frontendramverk
* Design system, komponentbibliotek eller gemensamma frontendmönster
* Tailwind CSS eller liknande ramverk
* CMS eller större kundnära webbplattformar
* SEO, webbanalys och datadriven vidareutveckling av digitala tjänster
* Azure DevOps eller motsvarande verktyg för utveckling, bygg och release
* DevSecOps eller säker utveckling
* Energi-, infrastruktur- eller annan samhällsviktig verksamhet

#### **Hos oss får du mer än ett jobb**


Hos oss får du vara med och utveckla en av våra viktigaste digitala kundkanaler. Du får stort inflytande över tekniska vägval, arbetssätt och hur vi bygger framtidens digitala kundresa. Du blir en del av ett kompetent och engagerat team där utveckling, samarbete och kunskapsutbyte står i fokus, med goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och en hållbar balans mellan arbete och fritid.


Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta hos oss på jobb.umeaenergi.se

### **Ansök senast 16 augusti**


Har du frågor? Hör av dig till rekryterande chef Oscar Mo, oscar.mo@umeaenergi.se eller 070-118 87 12.


Som samhällsviktig verksamhet är det viktigt för oss med en trygg arbetsmiljö för våra medarbetare samt att våra tillgångar och information är skyddade. Som ett led i vårt systematiska säkerhetsarbete genomför vi därför en bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidaten för den här tjänsten. Några av våra roller kräver säkerhetsprövning, om det är aktuellt för tjänsten du sökt så kommer du att få mer information kring det i ett senare skede.


Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Välkommen till oss!


Reklam? Nej tack. Vi har valt partner för rekryteringsannonsering.

title: Tech lead App
description:
### **Var med och forma framtidens mobila kundupplevelse**

**Av Umeåborna, för Umeåborna.**


Energibranschen förändras snabbt. Våra kunder förväntar sig enkla, trygga och relevanta digitala tjänster i vardagen – oavsett om det handlar om energi, bredband, laddning, förbrukning, fakturor eller kontakt med oss. Appen blir en allt viktigare del av kundmötet och en central kanal för att skapa värde, tillgänglighet och smartare energitjänster.


Nu söker vi en Tech Lead App som vill vara med och forma hur vi utvecklar framtidens digitala kundupplevelse.


Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera tekniskt djup med ledarskap, påverkan och möjligheten att bygga långsiktiga lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för våra kunder.

#### **Din roll**


Som Tech Lead App ansvarar du för den tekniska riktningen inom appområdet och spelar en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av Umeå Energis mobila kundupplevelse.


Du leder det tekniska arbetet i teamet och hjälper utvecklare att fatta bättre beslut, utvecklas i sin kompetens och bygga hållbara lösningar över tid. Rollen innebär också att du bidrar aktivt i utvecklingen och är nära både kod, arkitektur, produktägare, UX, verksamhet och våra samarbeten kopplat till apputvecklingen.


Appområdet är en viktig del av vårt kundgränssnitt och bedrivs i ett sammanhang där gemensamma lösningar, återanvändning, bolagsspecifika behov och långsiktig förvaltningsbarhet behöver balanseras. Det ställer krav på teknisk förståelse, samarbetsförmåga och förmåga att skapa riktning tillsammans med andra.


Hos oss handlar Tech lead rollen lika mycket om människor, samarbete och riktning som om teknik.

#### **Det här blir en stor del av din vardag**

* Leda och coacha utvecklare i teamet i deras tekniska utveckling
* Sätta teknisk riktning för appområdet, inklusive arkitektur, teknikval och arbetssätt
* Bidra aktivt i utvecklingen av våra mobila tjänster och kundnära funktioner
* Säkerställa kvalitet, prestanda, säkerhet, tillgänglighet och förvaltningsbarhet i appen
* Driva gemensamma tekniska principer, kodstandarder och best practices
* Bidra till att skapa återanvändbara lösningar, gemensamma komponenter och en hållbar teknisk grund
* Samarbeta nära produktägare, UX, arkitekter och verksamhet för att omsätta behov till värdeskapande funktioner
* Vara en aktiv del i roadmap-planering, tekniska vägval och långsiktiga initiativ inom appområdet
* Vidareutveckla effektiva bygg-, test- och releaseflöden
* Säkerställa ett säkert och effektivt nyttjande av moderna utvecklingsverktyg, exempelvis AI-verktyg
* Följa utvecklingen inom mobil apputveckling, kundupplevelse och digitala tjänster och omsätta relevanta möjligheter i praktiken

#### **Vem vi söker**


Vi söker dig som är tekniskt stark, men som också drivs av att hjälpa andra att lyckas.


Du har sannolikt arbetat med apputveckling eller kundnära digitala tjänster under flera år och känner dig trygg i att ta ett senior tekniskt ansvar. Samtidigt är du prestigelös, nyfiken och tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap.


Du har lätt för att röra dig mellan teknik, produkt och verksamhet och förstår att de bästa lösningarna skapas när teknisk kvalitet kombineras med förståelse för kundens och verksamhetens behov.


För dig handlar tekniskt ledarskap inte om att ha alla svar – utan om att skapa förutsättningar för att teamet tillsammans ska fatta bra beslut, utvecklas och leverera lösningar som håller över tid.

#### **För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har**

* Många års erfarenhet av apputveckling eller utveckling av kundnära digitala tjänster
* Erfarenhet av tekniskt ansvar eller senior teknisk rådgivning i ett utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av modern mobil apputveckling, exempelvis React Native, Flutter eller native iOS/Android
* God förståelse för API, integrationer och bakomliggande system
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD, Git, testautomatisering och moderna utvecklingsmetoder
* Förståelse för säkerhet, prestanda, användbarhet och tillgänglighet i digitala tjänster
* Erfarenhet av att vägleda, coacha eller stötta andra utvecklare
* Förmåga att omsätta verksamhets- och kundbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar

* Samarbete i miljöer där flera organisationer eller parter bidrar till en gemensam produkt
* Energi-, infrastruktur- eller annan samhällsviktig verksamhet

#### **Hos oss får du mer än ett jobb**


Hos oss får du vara med och utveckla en av våra viktigaste digitala kundkanaler. Du får stort inflytande över tekniska vägval, arbetssätt och hur vi bygger framtidens appupplevelse för våra kunder. Du blir en del av ett kompetent och engagerat team där utveckling, samarbete och kunskapsutbyte står i fokus, med goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och en hållbar balans mellan arbete och fritid.

Som ett led i vårt systematiska säkerhetsarbete genomför vi därför en bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidaten för den här tjänsten. Några av våra roller kräver säkerhetsprövning, om det är aktuellt för tjänsten du sökt så kommer du att få mer information kring det i ett senare skede.


Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Välkommen till oss!


Reklam? Nej tack. Vi har valt partner för rekryteringsannonsering.

title: Product Owner
description:
**Zexter** is an ambitious technology company building its own iGaming ecosystem. As one of our group brands, we are looking for a high calibre **Product Owner** to lead the planning, execution, and optimization of product initiatives, marketing campaigns, and player retention strategies.

**Key responsibilities:**

* Own the product lifecycle: from market research and hypothesis generation to product releases and post-launch analysis.
* Optimize key product metrics: improve conversion rates (Registration-to-Deposit), Retention, Churn Rate, LTV, and ARPU.
* Enhance user experience (UX/UI): design and optimize customer journeys (CJM), registration flows, KYC verification, and payment gateway experiences.
* Manage the product backlog: gather requirements from stakeholders, prioritize initiatives using frameworks such as RICE/ICE, and create clear product specifications for the development team.
* Drive product decisions with data: conduct A/B tests and perform in-depth user behavior analysis using product analytics tools.
* Develop engagement and retention mechanics: improve loyalty programs, tournaments, bonus systems, and VIP programs.

**Job Requirements:**

* 3+ years of experience in iGaming: solid understanding of online casino products (Slots, Live Casino) and/or Sportsbook.
* Knowledge of regulatory environments: understanding of market-specific requirements (Tier-1, LATAM, Asia, etc.), as well as the fundamentals of compliance and Responsible Gambling.
* Technical background: understanding of APIs, game provider integrations, and payment system integrations.
* Hands-on experience with product tools: Amplitude, Mixpanel, Google Analytics, Jira, Confluence, and Figma.
* Russian level: Fluent
* English proficiency: Upper-Intermediate (B2) or higher, sufficient for competitor analysis and communication with international partners.

**Nice to have:**

* Experience launching iGaming products from scratch (crypto casinos, Telegram casinos, or mobile applications).
* Understanding of iGaming traffic acquisition channels, including SEO, PPC, and Affiliate Marketing.

**What We Offer:**

* Flexibility: fully remote work.
* Compensation: competitive salary.
* Work environment: minimal bureaucracy, a strong engineering team, and the freedom to bring your ideas to life.
* Work in a dynamic and rapidly growing iGaming environment
* Exciting career paths and growth opportunities

title: UX Designer
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a UX Designer with strong AI experience to help shape not only the products we design, but also how design is practiced, specified, scaled, and implemented across our global product organisation.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to join an industry still in an early stage of digital maturity, where you can have a significant impact. We see customer experience as a critical differentiator and an important part of our ambition to transform the global property management industry.
   

  

 You’ll join a global design team led by the Head of CX & UX in Stockholm, Sweden. This role combines hands-on UX and interaction design in our AI team with helping the wider design team scale quality, consistency, design systems, and AI-assisted product development workflows globally. You will collaborate with the global design team and support knowledge sharing across all our markets, including the UK, Europe, the US, and Mexico. As part of this role, you will shape both intuitive customer-facing experiences and complex internal workflows for property management employees.
   

  

 You will help mature how our design team works across markets, products, and disciplines. This includes improving design system structure, documentation, governance, and adoption; defining practical quality standards; and establishing clearer ways of working across Figma, design specifications, no-code tools, and AI-assisted development workflows.
   

  

 AI will be central to how we evolve our design practice going forward, balancing the efficiency of AI agents with the judgement, taste, and craft of experienced designers. Experience in both DesignOps and AI-assisted design and development will therefore be a strong advantage.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Work and lead the “ordinary” design process within product teams - translating user needs, business goals, and technical constraints into clear flows, prototypes, interaction design to test and learn iteratively.
* Define design practices for agent driven development workflows, and how design artefacts should be specified so they can be used effectively by designers, product managers, engineers, and agents. Eg specification formats, reusable prompts, design skills, MCPs, and validation methods.
* Define how design artefacts — such as user flows, service blueprints, prototypes, component specifications, interaction rules, and acceptance criteria — can better steer and validate AI-assisted implementation.
* Support more efficient research and validation practices, like how we evaluate product iterations and AI-generated outputs against user needs, design system standards, accessibility expectations, and product quality criteria. This includes, for example, defining/creating tools for research planning, recruitment processes, GDPR considerations, research templates, and maintaining a research repository.
* Lead the work with the Odevo design system(s) by improving component documentation, governance, accessibility standards, usage guidance, and alignment between design components/patterns and code.


**Who You Are**
 You are genuinely interested in understanding people’s needs, behaviours, and motivations, and you use that insight to shape services that deliver real value. You combine strong design craft with systems thinking and can move comfortably between user needs, business outcomes, service journeys, and detailed interaction design.
   

  

 You strive for quality, value collaboration over prestige, and enjoy contributing to a strong team culture. You are a strong communicator who can turn research insights and design rationale into shared understanding across teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 You enjoy making design work more legible, scalable, and repeatable. You care about the craft of design, but also about the systems, rituals, documentation, and standards that help teams deliver good design consistently. You are comfortable moving between hands-on product design and improving the underlying ways of working that support the wider design organisation.
   

  

 You are pragmatic about AI: curious and experimental, but also thoughtful about quality, trust, transparency, human oversight, and when AI should or should not be used.
   

  

**Experience**
* 5+ years of experience as a UX Designer, Product Designer, or similar role, working on complex digital products.
* Bachelor’s degree in design, HCI, behavioural science, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Strong proficiency in Figma, prototyping, interaction design, UX research, service design, and design systems.
* Experience designing web and mobile products for complex, data-rich, workflow-heavy, or operational environments.
* Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams with product managers, engineers, designers, and stakeholders.
* Experience contributing to DesignOps and design systems, including documentation, governance, quality standards, tooling, ResearchOps, and alignment between design and code.
* Experience with AI-driven design or development workflows, including how structured specifications, component rules, interaction logic, and acceptance criteria can guide AI-assisted implementation.
* Experience designing AI-enabled product experiences, such as intelligent search, automation, recommendations, copilots, or decision-support tools.
* Property management or proptech experience is a plus.


**What We Offer**
* Professional growth - to work with the most talented developers in the industry.
* Modern technology - we invest in the latest technologies and tools and encourage our team members to share their ideas and take ownership of their work.
* Innovation - to work on exciting projects that push the boundaries of our industry and make a real impact.
* Commitment to quality - a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values profitable and long-term product development.


**Sounds like you?** 
 Apply today!
   

  

 #msl
   

  

 From 30 K to 2,2 million homes under Management in 5 years
   

  

 year est.
   

  

 Homes
   

  

 colleagues
   

  

 Markets
   

  

 property owners

title: UX-Designer till Pythagoras – forma framtidens fastighetssystem
description:
Vill du vara med och skapa framtidens digitala verktyg för proaktiv och datadriven fastighetsförvaltning?
   

  

 Hos Pythagoras får du möjlighet att utveckla användarupplevelsen i ett system som är helt centralt för fastighetsförvaltningen hos stora industriföretag, kommuner och andra organisationer över hela Sverige, och som hjälper dem att ha full koll på sina byggnader och lokaler.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en UX-Designer som vill göra komplex information enkel, tydlig och användarvänlig för en varierad användargrupp, från lokalvårdare och tekniker ute på fältet till ansvariga för fastighetsförvaltningen inne på kontoret.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som UX-designer hos oss har du en central roll i att utveckla användarupplevelsen i våra lösningar, och du är även delaktig i att utforma produktens funktion tillsammans med produktchefer, utvecklare och andra specialister. Som UX-designer är du ansvarig för att säkerställa att våra lösningar är intuitiva, effektiva och möter användarnas verkliga behov.
   

  

 Du kommer att vara drivande i hela designprocessen, från användarinsikter och analys till prototyper och färdiga lösningar, och du kommer att använda AI som ett av dina viktigaste verktyg.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Genomföra behovsanalyser genom workshops, användarintervjuer, enkäter och användningstester
* Analysera och designa användarflöden
* Ta fram prototyper och designskisser
* Samarbeta nära produktchef, utvecklare och modulexperter
* Arbeta tillsammans med UI-designer och skribent för att skapa en helhetsupplevelse
* Följa upp och utvärdera funktionalitet under utvecklingsprocessen och hos kunder
* Bidra till att utveckla vårt arbetssätt, med eller utan AI


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har eftergymnasial utbildning inom UX-design, interaktionsdesign eller liknande
* Har minst 3-5 års erfarenhet som UX-designer
* Gillar utmaningen med komplexa system eller affärssystem
* Har erfarenhet av att genomföra användarstudier och designa användarflöden
* Är van att arbeta i tvärfunktionella produktteam


 Det är en fördel om du även har erfarenhet av fastighetsbranschen.
   

  

**Som person tror vi att du**
* Har lätt för att samarbeta och leda workshops
* Är nyfiken och håller dig uppdaterad inom UX och ny teknik
* Tar initiativ och driver arbetet framåt
* Gillar att lösa komplexa problem tillsammans med andra


**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
 I den här rollen får du möjlighet att komma till en arbetsplats med hjälpsamma och engagerade kollegor i en företagskultur som präglas av en stark teamkänsla. Hos oss finns stora möjligheter att utvecklas inom företaget.
   

  

 Vi är en social arbetsplats och är inne på kontoret 2–3 dagar i veckan med många gemensamma aktiviteter, såsom gemensamma frukostar och After Works. Vi sitter i trevliga lokaler på Södermalm i Stockholm.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder ett generöst förmånspaket som inkluderar friskvårdsbidrag, privat sjukvårdsförsäkring och gym i huset – samt möjlighet att träna på arbetstid.
   

  

 Detta är en heltidstjänst där du blir anställd av Pythagoras med start så snart som möjligt. Anställningen inleds med en sex månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Är du redo att bygga nästa generations fastighetssystem? Skicka in din ansökan idag!
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Du ansöker enkelt genom att registrera ditt CV i vårt rekryteringssystem. Har du en portfolio ser vi gärna att du bifogar den i din ansökan.
   

  

 Vi tillämpar löpande urval, så vänta inte med din ansökan utan sök så snart som möjligt. Under sommarperioden kan det dock ta lite längre tid innan du får återkoppling, eftersom det är semestertider.
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsansvarig Maria Danielsson på maria.danielsson@pythagoras.se
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-08-31
   

  

**Om oss**
 Pythagoras är en ledande leverantör av digitala lösningar för fastighetsförvaltning och verksamhetsstyrning. Vårt innovativa fastighetssystem bygger på digitala tvillingar som visualiserar verkligheten och förenklar teknisk och ekonomisk förvaltning, energiuppföljning och lokalvårdshantering.
   

  

 Med fokus på användarvänlighet, automatisering och datadrivna insikter skapar vi smarta processer anpassade för både privata och offentliga aktörer. Vår långa erfarenhet och kundnära approach gör oss till en pålitlig partner för morgondagens smarta fastigheter.

title: UI Designer
description:
**Are you passionate about creating a great gaming experience and developing a scalable product? Come help us build the best geography game! You will be a part of a team with huge impact, shaping the experience for our amazing 100 million players.** 




  





 At
 **GeoGuessr** 
 , we do more than create games. Since 2013, we’ve crafted a game that turns the world into a playground for the curious and knowledge-hungry. Over the last few years, we’ve focused on building an exceptional team - now over 80 people strong - while continuing to evolve the GeoGuessr experience for our passionate community of players. With more than 100 million players worldwide, we’re just getting started.
 



  





**The role** 




 We are looking for a highly skilled UI Designer who wants to help shape playful, immersive and visually engaging experiences across browser, Steam and mobile apps.
 



 You do not need to come from the gaming industry, but you should have a strong passion for creating digital products that feel alive, intuitive and beautifully crafted. You know how to use visual design, UI systems, motion, interaction and detail to capture attention, guide users and create memorable experiences.
 



 Your strength lies in creating polished and engaging interfaces, from expressive UI elements and artwork to transitions, animations and interaction details. You also have a solid understanding of user flows, product thinking and how design choices affect the overall experience.
 



 As a UI Designer at GeoGuessr, you will work closely with other UI designers, 3D designers and our tech teams to take the visual expression and game experience to the next level. You will help us make sure the experience feels cohesive, immersive and scalable across platforms.
 



 Innovation and exploration will be part of your daily work. You actively use your creativity, curiosity and design craft to improve your own work and contribute to the team’s direction. You are fluent in Figma and have started exploring how AI can support and expand your design process.
 



 This role is based at our office in Stockholm, where collaboration, high energy and strong team skills are highly valued.
 



  





**Who are you?** 



* You have proven experience of designing successful games or products.
* You have been working as a UI designer for at least 5+ years.
* You’re a strong visual designer with a good understanding of game flows and game concepts.
* You are an artist that utilize art, movements, and interactions to create an enjoyable experience for the players.
* You are self-motivated and always want to challenge yourself and others.
* You like to work in a flexible and innovative environment.
* You are ready to work in a fast-paced, scaling organization.



**Nice to have, but not a must** 



* Experience within motion and sound design.
* Experience within the gaming industry.



  





**Wait, there's more!** 




 We're offering a package of perks to keep you charged up and ready to create wonders:
 


* Daily breakfast and lunch at the office (with a splendid view).
* 6 weeks of vacation + 3 extra days off, for a well-deserved rest.
* Pension and insurance as per ITP1 guidelines.
* 50,000 SEK education benefit.
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance.
* A high energy and very much alive office.



 We encourage exercise during working hours. We provide a large selection of snacks and drinks for recovery. A home to simply enjoy.
 



 This role is full time based in Stockholm where we have invested in creating our unique home at Katarinavägen 17, in the glass house by Slussen.
 



  





 We’d love to hear from you! Please send us your application by August 3. We’ll start reviewing applications and meeting candidates in August.

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
**About Pleo**
 Messy spend management is tricky business. And tedious processes are a lose-lose situation for all involved, not just finance. At Pleo, we're changing that. We build spend solutions that make managing money seamless, empowering, and surprisingly effective for finance teams and employees alike - with a vision to help all businesses ‘go beyond’.
   

  

 The word ‘Pleo’ actually means ‘more than you’d expect’, and living by that mantra has been the secret to our success over the last 10 years.
   

  

 Now, we’re at a pivotal moment in our journey; every move we make has a direct impact on our 40,000+ customers, our business, and our collective success. We need people who take pride in uncovering customer needs, who turn complex problems into simple solutions, challenge the way things are done (respectfully), and always aim high. With great ambitions driving us forward, we can’t say we’ve got this whole thing figured out. And frankly, that’s half the fun! What we can say is that we’re a driven, progressive, and, importantly, a kind bunch of 850+ people from over 100 nationalities, all committed to delivering the future of business spending, together.
   

  

**Intro**
 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Product Designer** 
 to join our Product Design team at Pleo.
   

  

 Pleo has spent the last decade changing how companies spend. More than 40,000 businesses across Europe rely on us to manage expenses, cards, reimbursements, and company money with confidence.
   

  

 Now we’re entering our next chapter.
   

  

 The way people interact with software is changing rapidly. AI is reshaping how products are built and how customers expect them to work. We believe this doesn’t reduce the importance of product design: it raises the bar. More than ever, customers need products that make complex systems feel understandable, trustworthy, and effortless.
   

  

 We think fintech is one of the best places in the industry to do that.
   

  

 Every design decision sits at the intersection of trust, regulation, automation, business goals, and human behaviour. The challenge isn’t making finance look beautiful; it’s making financial complexity disappear.
   

  

 That’s the kind of design work we’re building at Pleo.
   

  

 You’ll join either our
 **Treasury or Spend Control area** 
 , two critical parts of the product that together help customers move money with confidence and stay in control of how it’s spent. Whether you’re designing cash management, transfers and investment experiences, or approval workflows, spending policies and controls, you’ll work on products that customers depend on every day.
   

  

 If you’re excited by designing systems rather than screens, enjoy solving difficult product problems, and want to help define what AI-powered product design looks like over the next decade, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

**Who You’ll Work With**
 You’ll report to our Director of Product Design and work within a cross-functional business area alongside Product Management, Engineering, Data, Research, and Content Design.
   

  

 Depending on which team you join, you’ll be embedded in either Treasury or Spend Control, while collaborating closely across both as we build a cohesive financial experience.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 At Pleo, we’re building products that give customers confidence over their company money: whether that’s moving it, growing it, or controlling how it’s spent.
   

  

 As a Senior Product Designer, you’ll own end-to-end design for a meaningful part of that experience. You’ll work on the moments that determine whether a customer understands their balances, moves money with confidence, sets up policies that actually work, or adopts features that make their financial operations smarter.
   

  

 In Treasury, that means cash management, transfers, automatic transfer rules, alerts, investment accounts, and multi-currency experiences.
   

  

 In Spend Control, that means policy engines, approval workflows, spending limits, card controls, and the frameworks that help finance teams delegate trust without losing oversight.
   

  

 Both areas share a common goal: turning financial complexity into experiences that feel clear, trustworthy, and effortless.
   

  

 You’ll work in a highly collaborative environment alongside Product, Engineering, Data, Research, and Content Design, moving quickly while making thoughtful, evidence-informed decisions.
   

  

 We also believe AI will become an essential part of every product designer’s toolkit. We expect designers to use it to accelerate exploration, research, prototyping, and execution - while continuing to rely on human judgment to understand customers, make trade-offs, and define product direction.
   

  

**Specifically, you’ll:**
* Own end-to-end design for key surfaces within your team’s area - whether that’s money movement, policy configuration, or something in between.
* Shape the design strategy for your area, working from first principles, customer insight, and product strategy.
* Partner with Data and Research to define success, instrument your work, and learn from what you ship.
* Drive feature adoption through thoughtful introduction patterns that help existing customers discover and understand new capabilities.
* Use Pleo’s design system, Telescope, fluently while contributing new patterns back whenever you identify opportunities.
* Bring content and localisation thinking into your work from the beginning. Great financial products work across languages, markets, and regulatory contexts.
* Raise the quality bar through critique, documentation, mentoring, and by consistently demonstrating excellent craft.


**What You Bring**
 You’ll thrive here if you have:
   

  

* Significant experience designing financial, data-dense, policy-driven, or otherwise complex software products.
* A portfolio that demonstrates exceptional craft, strong product thinking, and measurable customer or business impact. We’re interested in how you think just as much as what you shipped.
* Comfort using quantitative data to sharpen your judgment - not replace it.
* Experience partnering closely with Research, Analytics, Product Management, and Engineering, knowing when each discipline should lead.
* Strong communication skills that help teams understand not only what you’re proposing, but why.
* A pragmatic instinct for balancing quality, speed, and technical reality.
* Comfort operating in ambiguity. You’re equally comfortable defining the problem and solving it.


 You’ve done things like…
   

  

* Redesigned a financial flow: transfers, account setup, policy configuration, approvals, or something similarly complex; and measurably improved customer outcomes.
* Designed and evaluated experiments by forming hypotheses, testing ideas, and making informed decisions from the results.
* Built products across multiple markets where localisation and regulation were design constraints from day one.
* Identified a structural customer problem and successfully influenced the organisation to solve it at the appropriate level.
* Took a workflow that customers accepted as “just how it works” and redesigned it into something dramatically simpler.
* Mentored designers or helped improve how your organisation approaches product design… not just your own work.


**Why this role might be a good fit**
 This role is a good fit if:
   

  

* You enjoy turning complicated systems into experiences customers immediately understand.
* You believe trust is something products earn through every interaction.
* You’re excited by the combination of systems thinking, interaction design, data, experimentation, and emerging AI capabilities.
* You want genuine ownership of a product area and are motivated by outcomes rather than output.
* You enjoy collaborating with smart people who challenge each other’s thinking and care deeply about craft.


 This role probably isn’t the right fit if:
   

  

* You prefer keeping domain complexity at arm’s length. Treasury and Spend Control reward curiosity and deep understanding.
* You’d rather work independently than collaboratively. Our best work happens across disciplines.
* You aren’t interested in connecting design decisions to measurable customer outcomes.


**How You’ll Develop**
 In your first few months, you’ll:
   

  

* Become deeply immersed in your product area, understanding customers, the business, the technology, and where the biggest opportunities exist.
* Partner with your Product Manager and Engineering Lead to identify a meaningful area of ownership and begin shipping improvements.
* Establish trusted working relationships and your own design rhythm within the team.


 Over time, you’ll:
   

  

* Own strategy as well as execution for an increasingly important part of the product.
* Build a track record of shipped improvements backed by evidence, not opinion.
* Become a recognised voice on designing complex financial products across Pleo.


 We’re building the kind of design organisation we wish already existed: one that combines exceptional craft, rigorous product thinking, AI-native ways of working, and genuine ownership.
   

  

 If that sounds like the kind of team you’d like to help build, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Application deadline**
 This role window closes on
 **July 8th.**
 We're keeping the window short so we can give everyone the focus they deserve - no one likes being left in a waiting bubble.
   

  

 If you're curious about what's next, don't overthink it, we'd love to find you in our inbox today!
   

  

 Please note: We can hire on a remote, hybrid or in-person set-up in any of the locations listed on the advert but you will need to be physically based in the country of your choice with a valid right to work.
   

  

 We are unable to offer visa sponsorship for this role in any of the listed locations.
   

  

**Show Me The Benefits**
* Your own Pleo card (no more out-of-pocket spending!)
* Lunch is on us for your work days - enjoy catered meals or receive a lunch allowance based on your local office
* Comprehensive private healthcare - depending on your location, coverage options include Vitality, Alan or Médis
* We offer 25 days of holiday + your public holidays
* For our Team, we offer both hybrid and fully remote working options
* We use MyndUp to give our employees access to free mental health and well-being support with great success so far
* Paid parental leave - we want to make sure that we're supportive of families and help you feel that you don't have to compromise your family due to work


**The interview process**
 If your application is successful, our interview process is as follows:
   

  

* Intro call: A 30-minute chat with our Talent Partner to discuss the role, your background, and your experience with designing complex systems.
* HM interview: A 30-minute conversation with the Hiring Manager focused on your experience, ways of working, and how you’d partner with the team.
* Portfolio conversation: A deep dive with a Product Designer and Engineering/Product partners where you’ll walk us through one or two case studies, ideally including financial, data-dense, policy-driven design work, or otherwise complex software products you own.
* Real time app critique or final session with our Chief Technical Product Officer to align on product direction, craft expectations, and how you’d contribute at a strategic level.


**About Your Application**
* English first. Since it's our company language, please submit your application in English. You’ll be using it a lot if you join us.
* A fair look for everyone. Our talent team reads every single application to ensure the process is fair. To keep things running smoothly, we only accept applications through our system—our support team can’t pass on calls or emails.
* Diversity drives us. We can only reach our goals if our team reflects the world around us. That starts with you hitting apply, even if you don't tick every single box. We encourage people from all backgrounds and experiences to join us.
* Interview at your best. We want you to feel comfortable throughout the process. If you have any accessibility requirements or need a specific format, email belonging@pleo.io. We’ll design a process that works for you.
* Your data is safe. When you apply, we process your personal data as a data processor. For more information on how Pleo processes personal data, read our Privacy Policy here.
* Applying for multiple roles? Nothing is stopping you, and we assess every role independently. However, we do look for alignment, so make sure you can explain why your interest and experience are right for each specific role.
* Reapplying. If you’re applying for the same role again, please wait six months from your last decision before hitting submit.

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
*Det här är en unik chans att forma hur vi etablerar oss på den svenska marknaden. Med en stabil och lönsam organisation i ryggen och fokus på kunden får du ägarskap över en produkt som gör skillnad.* 




  





**Om oss** 




 Allica Bank finns för att ge små och medelstora företag den bank de förtjänar. SME:er är ryggraden i den brittiska ekonomin, men har länge hamnat i kläm mellan banker byggda för privatpersoner och dem byggda för storbolag. Vi förändrar det, med egenutvecklad teknologi och genuina kundrelationer.
 



  





 Sedan 2019 har vi vuxit till att bli det snabbast växande fintech-bolaget i Storbritanniens historia. Vi är lönsamma, växer snabbt och stängde i februari 2026 en Series D-runda på 155 miljoner dollar för att finansiera vår internationella expansion. Sverige är vår första marknad utanför Storbritannien.
 



  





 Under de senaste åren har vi byggt om hela Allicas bankupplevelse från grunden och skapat den produktplattform som nu ligger till grund för vår internationella satsning. Som vår första Product Designer i Sverige får du en nyckelroll i att anpassa och vidareutveckla upplevelsen för svenska företag.
 



  





**Rollen** 




 Som Allicas första Product Designer i Sverige får du ansvar för att anpassa och vidareutveckla kundupplevelsen för svenska företag. Samtidigt blir du en del av ett etablerat designteam med cirka 20 designers i Storbritannien, vilket ger dig stort inflytande lokalt och nära samarbete med erfarna designkollegor.
 



  





 I rollen kommer du arbeta i produktteamet för Business Rewards Account, vårt flaggskeppskonto för SME:er, och kommer rapportera direkt till Director of UX and Design i UK. En central del av rollen är att anpassa vår kundupplevelse för den svenska marknaden med hänsyn till lokala krav, utan att kompromissa med den enkelhet och elegans som definierar produkten. Här får du möjligheten att använda din erfarenhet i en roll där alla svar inte finns från början. Du får stort utrymme att påverka riktningen, driva arbetet framåt och skapa struktur i komplexa problemområden.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 



* Driva designvisionen i ditt produktteam och ta komplexa UX-problem från idé till lansering med stort eget ägarskap
* Självständigt planera och genomföra användarresearch och omsätta insikter till produktstrategi
* Utforska och använda AI-baserade verktyg för att stärka både effektiviteten och kvaliteten i designarbetet, samt dela lärdomar och arbetssätt med resten av organisationen
* Bidra till designsystemet och lyfta designkulturen genom mentorskap och gemensamt lärande



  





**Troligtvis har du...** 




 ...minst fyra års erfarenhet av produktdesign för digitala produkter och god vana av Figma. Erfarenhet av AI-verktyg som Claude Design/Code, Codex eller liknande är meriterande. Du arbetar iterativt, använder kundfeedback för att lära snabbt och trivs i miljöer där det händer mycket. Du bygger förtroende hos olika intressenter och är van att navigera mellan användarbehov, affärsmål och tekniska förutsättningar för att driva produkten framåt.
 



  





 Erfarenhet av fintech eller finansiella tjänster är meriterande, men inget krav. Nyfikenhet på komplexa domäner väger tyngre. Du behöver kunna tala och skriva flytande på svenska och obehindrat på engelska.
 



  




* **Du behöver inte pricka in allt**



 Uppfyller du inte alla kompetenser eller krav i annonsen? Oroa dig inte om du inte! Om du tror att rollen passar dig vill vi gärna höra från dig.
 



  




* **Flexibilitet i vardagen**



 Vi vet att alla arbetar som bäst på olika sätt och att livet utanför jobbet ser olika ut. Därför erbjuder Allica Bank flexibilitet i hur du planerar din arbetsdag. Berätta gärna vad som fungerar bäst för dig, så gör vi vårt bästa för att hitta en lösning som fungerar både för dig och teamet.
 



  




* **Mångfald**



 Vi tror att de bästa teamen består av människor med olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och perspektiv. På Allica Bank vill vi att alla ska känna sig välkomna och kunna vara sig själva på jobbet.
 



  





 Vi ser fram emot att läsa din ansökan! Urvalsprocessen sker löpande så ansök idag här:

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Are you a product designer shaping best-in-class podcast experiences?
   

  

 What if your design work didn’t just improve interfaces, but changed how people build habits and keep coming back?
   

  

 At Podme, success isn’t measured by what we ship. It’s measured by whether people return, build habits, and stay. That means design isn’t just about screens it’s about helping users succeed in ways that drive real business outcomes.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Product Designer (UX) who wants to design at that level of impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is not a role for someone who polishes interfaces after decisions are already made.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who helps shape what gets built, by understanding user behavior, identifying the right problems, and designing experiences that create meaningful outcomes for both listeners and the business.
   

  

 At Podme, great design helps people discover content they love, continue listening effortlessly, and build habits around premium podcasts and audio experiences.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

****As a Senior Product Designer (UX), You Will:****
* Design intuitive and delightful mobile experiences across iOS and Android
* Create seamless listening and viewing experiences around premium podcasts
* Frame product opportunities through user behavior, motivation, and outcomes
* Work closely with Product Managers, Engineers, Data Analysts, and stakeholders across the company
* Use research, experimentation, and data to validate decisions and improve experiences continuously
* Help shape product direction, not just interface execution


 You’ll be especially focused on
   

  

**Designing for habits and continuation**
**You’ll Design Experiences That:**
* Reduce friction and cognitive load
* Help users discover content they genuinely care about
* Make continuation feel effortless across moments and devices
* Create clear and coherent journeys across listening and discovery
* Make Podme feel like a natural part of everyday routines


**Framing the right problems**
**You’ll:**
* Use research and behavioral data to identify where the experience breaks down
* Collaborate with stakeholders and subject matter experts to understand opportunities and constraints
* Turn insights into clear product direction, hypotheses, and design principles
* Focus on user outcomes before interface solutions


**Driving continuous discovery and learning**
**You’ll:**
* Participate actively in research and insight work
* Prototype and validate ideas early
* Run research experiments and iterate based on real behavior, not assumptions
* Help teams learn faster and make better product decisions


****Designing For Clarity, Trust, And Premium Experiences****
 You’ll help create experiences where:
   

  

* Navigation and continuation feel effortless
* Users feel confident in their choices
* The value of premium content is consistently clear
* Audio and video experiences feel seamless across contexts and devices


**Working as a true product partner**
 You’ll collaborate closely with Product Managers and Engineers to:
   

  

* Identify friction and opportunities
* Prioritize the most meaningful problems
* Validate outcomes through experiments and behavioral metrics
* Ensure experiences are scalable, feasible, and impactful


 Together, you share accountability for user outcomes, not just delivery.
   

  

**Contributing to a stronger design culture**
**You’ll:**
* Raise the bar for UX thinking, systems design, and product craft
* Help evolve how we design adaptive and AI-supported experiences
* Contribute to a culture where design drives measurable impact, not just output


**This position will report to the UX Manager at Podme.**
 What success looks like
   

  

* Your work leads to measurable improvements in how people experience Podme
* Teams focus on solving the right problems, not just shipping more features
* User needs and trade-offs become clearer, helping teams make better decisions faster
* You turn research and behavioral insights into clear product direction
* The experiences you design consistently increase repeat listening and habit formation
* You become a trusted partner in shaping product strategy and experience direction
* You help strengthen a product culture where design is deeply connected to business impact


 Who you are
   

  

* You have strong experience in product design for mobile products (iOS and Android)
* You think in systems, flows, and user journeys, not just individual screens
* You are comfortable working with ambiguity and helping shape direction
* You use research and data to inform and challenge decisions
* You collaborate naturally across disciplines and involve stakeholders early
* You care deeply about user outcomes, product quality, and business impact


 Bonus points if you have
   

  

* Experience with audio, video, or subscription products
* Experience designing recommendation or discovery experiences
* Experience working with AI-driven or adaptive systems
* Strong understanding of behavioral metrics and retention


****Who We Are****
 Podme is the place for premium podcasts and audiobooks. With over 350,000 paying subscribers, we’re available in Sweden, Norway, and Finland, and part of Schibsted Media since 2021.
   

  

 Our vision is to enrich people’s lives through stories, which embodies our core belief in the power of narratives to bring joy, meaning, and connection to individuals. We strive to create effortless and habit-forming audio and product experiences that resonate with the listener and add value in their everyday lives.
   

  

 We’re a friendly and passionate team of +80 people, here to make listening effortless, inspiring, and part of everyday life. Backed by Schibsted Media, the largest media group in Scandinavia, we are now on a growth journey which requires us to strengthen (example: the data-driven excellence in our company.

title: Senior CX Product Design Manager
description:
As our Senior CX Product Design Manager, you will lead the end-to-end airline product lifecycle management and define the customer journey across across a complex, multi-market and highly operational environment, where every touchpoint must balance customer needs, operational realities and commercial performance.
   

  

**Closing date 13th July**
**About Our Offer**
* Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, discretionary bonus schemes, generous travel benefits, extensive health & well-being support, and more.
* Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance with a dynamic working environment.
* A career to shape: Access the TUI Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
* Broaden your network: We champion intercultural collaboration and provide opportunities to work on global projects and teams
* Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation.


**About The Job**
* You'll design and continuously evolve the full airline product and customer journey across booking, pre-travel, airport, inflight and post-travel—navigating high operational and regulatory complexity with a focus on the customer and commercial value.
* You will translate commercial, operational and customer strategies into an integrated product lifecycle management that works across multiple markets, routes and fleets for flight only customers as well as package customers coordinated by the marketplace.
* You will orchestrate customer communications for the airline across all phases of travel, ensuring clarity, consistency and commercial effectiveness.
* Define and steer CX performance through robust KPIs, linking customer outcomes directly to revenue, cost and operational delivery.
* Lead cross-functional governance across airline operations, commercial, digital and CX teams to manage trade-offs and drive aligned decision-making at scale.


**About You**
* You have proven experience in CX design, service design or product strategy within complex, operational environments (ideally airline or travel)
* You have proven ability to operate across complex, multiple markets, stakeholders and systems, balancing customer, regulatory and operational constraints
* You possess strategic systems thinking, with the ability to define and manage large-scale customer journeys ensuring coherence across multiple touchpoints
* You bring a strong commercial acumen and know how CX decisions impact revenue, cost and customer value.
* You have excellent stakeholder leadership skills and are able to influence across a highly matrixed airline organisation and drive change at scale


 From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.
   

  

 We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.
   

  

**SECURITY STATEMENT**
 At TUI, safety is our top priority. We conduct thorough background checks on all employees who join our Airline. Rest assured; we’ll guide you on the necessary information you need to provide at each stage.
   

  

 Please note that if you are applying for a role in the UK, you must ensure you can provide a full 5 years referencing, plus a criminal record check for all countries you’ve resided in for more than 6 months in the past 5 years (some costs may apply).

title: Product Manager, User Experience
description:
**An Amazing Career Opportunity for a Product Manager User Experience!!**
**Location: Stockholm, Sweden / Suresnes, France / Cardiff, Wales / Krakow, Poland**
**Job ID: 42038**
 The Product Manager for User Experience will be responsible for mapping all user touch points across all categories of readers and translating these into a cohesive user experience.This will require revisiting the entire software tools & SDK product portfolio and establishing a class leading implementation strategy, facilitating the easy integration of our embedded products, as well as the desktop readers and handheld devices.
   

  

 This role comprises not only owning all cloud, desktop and mobile tools & SDKs but also our diverse Cloud APIs and services that help customers to integrate and manage our readers within their solutions. The PM will need to work closely with various teams, including Engineering, Sales, Pre-Sales, Marketing, and Operations, to successfully execute the defined strategies and meet business and market requirements.
   

  

 Are you a problem solver, an out-of-the-box thinker, and a knowledge seeker? If the answer is “yes,” this mission is for you. HID is seeking a new Product Manager for revitalizing the user experience within the RFID Reader division.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 HID powers the trusted identities of the world’s people, places, and things, allowing people to transact safely, work productively and travel freely.
   

  

 We are a high-tech software company headquartered in Austin, TX, with over 4,500 worldwide employees. Check us out here: www.hidglobal.com and https://youtu.be/23km5H4K9Eo
   

  

**Identification Technologies (IDT):**
