* Solid statistical foundations (experimental thinking, bias/variance, calibration, confidence/uncertainty, causal pitfalls).
* Proficiency in Python for data science (pandas, scikit-learn and/or similar) and SQL for analytics.
* Experience working with large-scale data in a modern data platform (e.g., Snowflake / cloud data warehouse environments).
* Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders; comfortable explaining model performance, tradeoffs, and limitations.


 Nice to have:
   

  

* Experience with time-to-event / survival analysis, uplift modeling, or causal inference methods.
* Experience deploying models into production (batch or near-real-time scoring), plus monitoring and alerting.
* Experience with feature stores, ML pipelines, or MLOps practices.
* Familiarity with Customer 360 / identity resolution / customer master data concepts.


 Ways of working
   

  

* You will work in a cross-functional environment with data engineers, analytics engineers, product partners, and domain experts.
* You will be based in Stockholm and collaborate closely with stakeholders across Volvo Cars.


**Volvo Cars. For Life.**
 For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.
   

  

 In our company, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with the drive to make a difference.
   

  

**Ready to take the next step?**
 Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a new role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than July 10th 2026. We are prioritising direct applications to ensure a fair and efficient application process.
   

  

 Please note that due to vacation break we will not be reviewing or getting back to applicants until week 33.
   

  

 For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Recruiter Simona Popencu at simona.popencu@volvocars.com. For specific questions about the position, please reach out to Hiring Manager Pierdomenico Polito at pierdomenico.polito@volvocars.com.
   

  

 As part of the recruitment process, the final candidates might undergo a background check.
   

  

 We welcome your application!

title: Senior Teknik applikationsförvaltare
description:
Vi söker nu en erfaren Senior Teknik applikationsförvaltare med goda kunskaper inom IT förvaltning, för ett spännande jobb som ger nytta för hela Region Stockholm. 
   

  





 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde är en del av Region Stockholm. Tjänsten är placerad på Torsplan under verksamhetsstöd Digitala tjänster, enheten System och Teknik.
   

  





****Om oss****




 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) bedriver hälso- och sjukvård för invånarna i Region Stockholm och ansvarar för IT-tjänster som stödjer vårdens arbete.
   

  





 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde är en del av Region Stockholm. Tjänsten är placerad på Torsplan under verksamhetsstöd Digitala tjänster, enheten System och Teknik.
   

  





****Vi erbjuder dig****




 SLSO erbjuder goda utvecklingsmöjligheter, ett bra samarbetsklimat och flexibla arbetsformer, inklusive möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån vissa dagar. Kulturen präglas av att vi stöttar varandra och har roligt tillsammans.
   

  





 Förmåner hos Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) bedriver hälso- och sjukvård för invånarna i Region Stockholm och ansvarar för IT-tjänster som stödjer vårdens arbete. 
   

  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:** 



* Leda och ansvara för den fulla tekniska förvaltningen av våra system, från överlämning till kontinuerlig drift och avveckling
* Agera huvudkontakt gentemot våra verksamheter och leverantörer gällande systemens tekniska status, prestanda, livscykelplanering samt incidenthantering.
* Planera, koordinera och följa upp underhåll, uppgraderingar och patchning i samråd med Driftorganisationen
* Arbeta proaktivt med kapacitetsplanering, livscykelhantering och säkerställande av att SLA:er och säkerhetskrav efterlevs
* Fånga upp nya behov hos våraverksamheter och driva vidareutveckling av systemen tillsammans med våra integrations- och projektteam.



****Kvalifikationer****



* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande kompetenser förvärvade genom annan utbildning i kombination med lång och relevant arbetserfarenhet
* Flerårig erfarenhet av teknisk systemförvaltning, IT-leverans eller motsvarande roll
* God generell förståelse för IT-infrastruktur (driftsmiljöer, nätverk, integrationer) för att kunna föra en initierad dialog med både tekniker och kravställare
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta processorienterat enligt etablerade ramverk för förvaltning och service management (t.ex. ITIL eller PM3)
* Vana vid att hantera leverantör relationer och agera rådgivande i tekniska frågor
* Du har goda kunskaper om applikations- och infrastrukturdrift samt grundläggande kunskaper inom informations- och IT säkerhet.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska samt väl utvecklad presentationsteknik
* Goda kunskaper att använda Office 365
* Gedigen erfarenhet att arbete med underleverantörer
* Erfarenhet av upphandlingar
* Gedigen erfarenhet av processarbete



 Det är meriterande om du också har: 
 


* aktuell erfarenhet av en roll inom systemförvaltning
* erfarenhet av offentlig sektor
* erfarenhet av Hälso- och sjukvårdsområdet
* erfarenhet av avtalshantering och LOU (lagen om offentlig upphandling)
* erfarenhet att använda processmetodik
* erfarenhet av Hälso- och sjukvårdsområdet



**Personliga egenskaper**




 För att lyckas i rollen är du en utpräglad relationsbyggare som är trygg i din kommunikation, både strategiskt och tekniskt. Du är strukturerad, självgående och har en stark ansvarskänsla för dina leveranser. Eftersom rollen innebär att balansera kundens behov med våra interna tekniska resurser krävs det att du är diplomatisk, lösningsorienterad och har en god affärsmässig förståelse. 
   

  





 Stor vikt läggs vid personlig lämplighet
   

  





****Mer information och ansökan****




 Sista ansökningsdag är
 **15 augusti 2026.** 
 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  





 Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att den inte behöver tas i anspråk för intern omplacering, enligt gällande regelverk.
   

  





**Vid patientnära arbete inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde:**




  

 - tillämpas registerkontroll före beslut om anställning enligt SLSO:s övergripande anvisning för registerkontroll vid anställning.
   

  





  

 - ska medarbetare som kommer att ha patientkontakt genomgå nyanställningsundersökning, enligt gällande direktiv, vilket sker genom företagshälsovården innan anställning.
   

  





  

 - krävs, förutom svensk yrkeslegitimation, goda kunskaper i svenska språket motsvarande nivå C1 enligt den gemensamma europeiska referensramen (GERS). Samma krav är vägledande vad gäller icke-legitimerad personal med patientkontakt.
   

  





**Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) är en av Sveriges största vårdgivare med 11 600 medarbetare. Vi erbjuder hälso- och sjukvård i Region Stockholms regi inom psykiatri, primärvård, geriatrik, ASIH, närakuter, somatisk specialistvård, habilitering och hälsa samt hjälpmedel. I samverkan med Karolinska Institutet bedriver vi forskning, utbildning och utveckling. Läs mer om SLSO här.**




****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Vice President B2B Customer Delivery & Operations
description:
**Lead the delivery and operations engine behind GlobalConnect’s Nordic B2B services**
 GlobalConnect is strengthening how we deliver, operate and continuously improve our B2B services across the Nordics. We are bringing ownership of managed network services, SD-WAN, managed LAN, cloud connectivity and security services into one delivery and operations organization.
   

  

 As VP B2B Customer Delivery & Operations, you will lead this organization and be part of the Nordic B2B management team. You will own service quality, SLA performance, cost efficiency and customer experience across the full service lifecycle; from platform operations and lifecycle management, detailed low level design, implementation to running the solution via ServiceDesk and Advisory Services.
   

  

**To Succeed In This Role, You Likely Have**
* Senior leadership experience from managed services, security services, SD-WAN, managed network services, managed LAN, cloud connectivity or another B2B technical services environment
* Experience leading customer-facing delivery and operations organizations at scale, including leading through other leaders
* Strong understanding of how overlay services are built, delivered and operated on top of underlay infrastructure, and how to manage the internal sourcing relationship this requires
* Commercial fluency: comfortable owning delivered revenue and growing advisory services alongside operational performance, not treating them as someone else’s number
* A track record of improving service performance, operational scalability and customer orientation through clear leadership and disciplined execution


**About The Role And The Team**
 You will lead the Nordic B2B delivery and operations organization for GlobalConnect’s overlay services; the customer-facing services delivered on top of our core infrastructure. This includes managed network services, SD-WAN, managed LAN, cloud connectivity and security services.
   

  

 The services in your portfolio depend on underlay infrastructure delivered by GlobalConnect’s Infrastructure unit. A key part of your role will therefore be to lead that internal customer relationship: defining what the B2B business needs from the underlying infrastructure, setting clear service expectations, following up on performance, and making sure the customer experiences the service as one connected delivery.
   

  

 You inherit a working delivery and operations base. The mandate is to strengthen it, raise performance, and build clearer lifecycle ownership across the full overlay portfolio; from implementation and delivery to service desk, operations and ongoing service improvement.
   

  

 This is a senior leadership role with direct impact on how GlobalConnect delivers, operates and improves B2B services across the Nordics.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Working On**
* Lead the B2B overlay delivery and operations organization across the Nordics, including service desk as the customer’s first point of contact
* End-to-end operational ownership of the overlay portfolio across implementation, delivery, service desk, operations, and lifecycle managemen
* Providing Advisory Services to existing customers to increase their value from the solutions
* Improve service quality, SLA performance, cost efficiency and operational scalability across the overlay portfolio
* Lead the internal customer relationship with the Infrastructure unit by setting clear expectations, following up on performance and ensuring a consistent customer experience
* Take senior ownership of critical customer escalations that cross service and infrastructure boundaries
* Work closely with product, commercial, technical and platform leaders to ensure customer commitments are deliverable, commercially sound and operationally sustainable


**What You’ll Be Accountable For**
 In this role, success will be measured across three connected areas:
   

  

* Commercial outcomes — including delivered revenue and growth in advisory services
* Service performance — including delivery speed, service quality and incident response
* Customer experience — measured at every meaningful customer touchpoint, from delivery through service desk to ongoing support


 You will be expected to understand these areas in depth, set clear targets and lead the organization to deliver measurable improvement over time.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for a senior leader who understands how technical B2B services are built, delivered and operated on top of underlying infrastructure, and who knows how to lead the internal supplier relationships needed to create one reliable customer experience.
   

  

 You are comfortable operating at the intersection of customer experience, service quality, commercial performance and internal supplier management. You can set clear direction, build trust across functions and create accountability without losing collaboration.
   

  

 You know how to lead through change. You can strengthen an existing organization, improve discipline and performance, and help teams understand what good looks like. You are also able to balance commercial pressure with operational quality and long-term customer trust.
   

  

 This role is well suited for someone who wants to shape a Nordic delivery and operations unit with high customer impact, clear business relevance and a broad leadership mandate.
   

  

 Does this sound like you? If so, we would love to hear from you.
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
* Initial conversation with Talent Acquisition Partner Anna
* Interview with the Hiring Manager
* Capability and case interview with the Hiring Manager and a peer stakeholder
* Personality and ability assessment, with feedback and discussion
* Final alignment, references and offer


 In this role, you will be close to the customer, close to the business and close to the operational engine that makes our services work. You will have the opportunity to strengthen how GlobalConnect delivers and operates B2B services across the Nordics.
   

  

 The role is located in either Stockholm or Oslo.
   

  

 No need for a personal letter – just send us your CV or LinkedIn profile.
   

  

 Join us and be part of the transformation in the most exciting company within critical digital infrastructure in Northern Europe!
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Technical Program Manager
description:
**About Bolt**
 Bolt is shaping a future where cities are built for people, not cars. What started as an ambitious project of a 19-year-old in 2013 has grown into a global mobility platform used by more than 200 million customers and 4.5 million driver and courier partners across 50 countries.
   

  

 From ride-hailing and food delivery to scooters, e-bikes, and car-sharing, Bolt helps people move through cities every day. Small, autonomous teams drive this work, combining the speed and ownership of a startup with the scale of a global technology company backed by more than €1bn in funding.
   

  

 And we're just getting started.
   

  

**Why join Bolt?**
* Build the future of mobility and help transform how people live and move in cities.
* Tackle challenges at scale that span technology, operations, regulation, and growth.
* Take real ownership early. Small, lean teams mean your decisions matter from day one, and you'll learn fast alongside some of the best people in the industry.
* Join one of Europe's leading technology companies, backed by world-class investors including Sequoia.


**About The Role**
 Bolt is building a commercial L4 autonomous ride-hailing service in Europe. The programme spans multiple simultaneous workstreams — ADS technology partnerships, vehicle homologation, fleet infrastructure, regulatory approvals, and mobility platform integration — across multiple European markets starting with Luxembourg.
   

  

 This role exists because moving fast across all of those workstreams simultaneously, while keeping every partner aligned, every regulatory dependency visible, and every documented commitment honoured, requires a distinct person whose primary output is programme coherence. Not slides. Not strategy decks. Actual forward motion, recorded, traceable, and accelerating.
   

  

 The Technical Programme Manager is the connective tissue of the AV deployment programme. You sit between the Head of Product & Deployment, the ADS technology partners, the vehicle OEMs, the regulatory authorities, and the internal engineering and operations teams — translating technical complexity into clear decisions, clear accountabilities, and clear written records that the programme can build on.
   

  

**Main Tasks And Responsibilities**
* Own and maintain the master programme plan and critical path across all workstreams, managing risks, dependencies, and milestone reporting to board and external partners.
* Lead delivery-focused relationships with ADS technology partners, tracking contractual milestones, running structured review cadences, and managing cross-partner information flow.
* Ensure consistency across workstream technical decisions, own interface documentation (stack diagrams, API specs, data flow architecture), and facilitate resolution of technical conflicts.
* Maintain a regulatory milestone tracker across European markets, coordinate evidence package submissions, and monitor evolving EU and national regulatory requirements for programme impact.
* Produce and maintain the core documentation set including programme plan, risk register, decision log, and partner commitment tracker, ensuring institutional knowledge is captured and accessible.
* Write weekly programme status reports, prepare monthly board-level summaries with milestone progress and risk overviews, and produce formal partner-facing communications including action logs and change notifications.


**About You**
* Solid experience in technical programme or project management in complex, multi-partner, multi-workstream environments.
* Direct experience in at least one of: autonomous vehicles, advanced mobility, robotics, aerospace, or similarly safety-critical systems engineering.
* Demonstrated ability to manage simultaneous delivery relationships with external technology partners — not just internal teams.
* Experience producing and maintaining programme documentation that technical and non-technical stakeholders actually use: programme plans, risk registers, decision logs, integration architecture documents.
* Comfort operating at both the strategic level (board communications, partner strategy) and the detailed level (tracking individual deliverable milestones, running working-level partner reviews).
* Working knowledge of safety-critical systems development processes (V-model, systems engineering, safety case structure, or equivalent) and familiarity with European regulatory environments — type approval, national competent authorities, or equivalent.


**Why you’ll love it here**
* Accelerate your professional growth with unique career opportunities.
* Enjoy a rewarding salary and stock options, knowing that as Bolt succeeds, so do you.
* Take care of your physical and mental health with our wellness perks.
* Celebrate 5 years at Bolt with a 1-month paid sabbatical to recharge.
* Connect with colleagues at annual company events and smaller team gatherings.
* Balance flexibility and in-person collaboration with our hybrid model, including at least 12 monthly in-office days.


*Some perks may differ depending on your location and role.*
 At Bolt, using AI daily is a baseline expectation for everyone. If there’s a faster, smarter way to do your work, we expect you to find it. You’re still responsible for the output, so the standard stays high when using AI tools.
   

  

 Experience is great, but what we really look for is drive, intelligence, and integrity. So even if you don’t tick every box, please consider applying!
   

  

**Everyone is welcome**
 Bolt is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace where all qualified applicants are considered for employment without regard to race, colour, nationality, religion, gender or gender identity, sexual orientation, age, or disability.
   

  

 We welcome applications from all backgrounds and are happy to make reasonable accommodations throughout our hiring process. If you require any adjustments, please let us know.

title: AI Engineer
description:
Join our innovative team at Curamando as an
 **AI Engineer** 
 ! Work with cutting-edge technologies, mentor others, and help shape the future of our growing AI practice in a collaborative, inclusive environment.
   

  

 At Curamando, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. We empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it.
   

  

 Curamando, part of the Nordic consulting house Eidra, specialises in accelerating top-line growth through digital strategy and innovation. We're a fast-growing consultancy already partnering with industry leaders — from cutting-edge automotive brands to forward-looking tech companies. Together with Eidra's 1,200+ strategists, creatives, and engineers spread across Stockholm, New York, and beyond, we tackle ambitious problems at scale. This role isn't only about delivering on Curamando's value offering — you'll also play an integral part in helping other Eidra verticals deliver on their AI agenda, well beyond commerce.
   

  

 We're looking for people ready to join us on this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication. This role is open across multiple levels — from individual contributors to senior engineers and emerging leaders — and offers an opportunity to develop your craft while working closely with clients on real-world AI challenges.
   

  

 Job Summary:
   

  

 We are seeking AI Engineers with experience in building robust, scalable, AI-powered solutions. The ideal candidate combines a product engineering mindset with deep enthusiasm for advancing AI capabilities, a strong interest in knowledge sharing and mentoring, and a genuine curiosity about how to build value offerings on the cutting edge of AI.
   

  

 For more senior candidates, we're particularly interested in people with an intrapreneurial and business development mindset - engineers who want to help grow our AI Core team from a 15–20 person operation to 40+, and who see themselves as builders of the company, not just of the deliverables.
   

  

 As an AI Engineer at Curamando, your role will involve:
   

  

* Helping clients clarify their questions and determining whether AI is a suitable solution
* Understanding the limitations of models and how to address them within a product's UX
* Architecting agentic solutions (context, memory, and tool/skill handling) and implementing them using frameworks such as Mastra, Microsoft Agent Framework, LangChain/LangGraph
* Applying stochastic test casing and trace-based reasoning to evaluate, test, and improve agent behaviour, supported by observability tooling (Langfuse, Promptfoo, etc.)
* Understanding and applying core AI concepts such as redlining, document chunking for accuracy, efficient use of embeddings, and debugging AI systems
* Validating, deploying, monitoring, and maintaining models, ensuring they can be used at scale
* Developing and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines and ML workflows, optimising for performance and reliability
* Working with diverse, cross-functional teams across Curamando and Eidra on projects that deliver groundbreaking AI solutions


 For senior candidates and emerging leaders, the role also includes:
   

  

* Mentoring and inspiring: Nurturing a growing team of AI engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and collaborative problem-solving - essential in a field that moves this fast
* Building the practice: Contributing to how we shape our AI value offering, identifying new opportunities, and helping evolve the AI Core team as it scales
* Cross-vertical impact: Partnering with other Eidra companies to bring AI capability to domains beyond Curamando's core focus


 We also welcome experienced software engineers looking to transition into AI:
   

  

* Strong product development background with several years of software engineering experience
* Active engagement in AI (agents, wrappers, context engineering)
* Comfortable working in a product/engineering team


 Who You Are:
   

  

 We value candidates who demonstrate:
   

  

* Great delivery skills: Proven capability to deliver AI solutions
* Strong AI intuition: A deep understanding of AI concepts
* A people mindset: Genuine interest in knowledge sharing, mentoring, and lifting those around you
* Curiosity: Enthusiasm for emerging technologies, creativity in problem-solving, and eagerness to learn in a rapidly evolving AI landscape
* Full-stack product thinking: Frontend or backend experience outside the traditional AI field, with the ability to build end-to-end
* An intrapreneurial spirit (especially for senior roles): Interest in helping build the company, not just deliver to clients - finding your path in our career framework means being curious about the business too
* A passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving
* Eagerness to learn, grow, and take on new challenges
* Belief in collaboration, diversity, and making a significant impact


 What We Offer:
   

  

* A chance to work closely with global brands on diverse projects that push the boundaries of what's possible - across Curamando and the wider Eidra group.
* A fun and fair work environment where you can expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams in a highly ambitious setting.
* The opportunity to shape how our AI practice evolves and scales.


 Why Curamando?
   

  

 Career Framework: We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Together with your coach, you'll build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

 Work-Life Balance: At Curamando, diversity is our strength. We've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance and welcomes team members from all walks of life.
   

  

 Innovations and Learning: Technology is always evolving. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more — sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

 Skills Over Degrees: We're more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Curamando.
   

  

**About Curamando**
 Curamando, part of the Nordic consulting house Eidra, specialises in accelerating top-line growth through digital strategy and innovation. We're a fast-growing consultancy already partnering with industry leaders - from cutting-edge automotive brands to forward-looking tech companies. Together with Eidra's 1,200+ strategists, creatives, and engineers across Stockholm, New York, and beyond, we tackle ambitious problems at scale.
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals. We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Konsult inom informationssäkerhet, GRC eller cybersäkerhet?
description:
Är du en analytisk och strukturerad säkerhetstalang i början av din karriär, eller en etablerad expert som vill ta nästa strategiska kliv? Drivs du av att förstå hur teknik, regulatoriska ramverk (GRC) och mänskligt beteende samspelar för att skapa verksamhetskritisk motståndskraft?
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter** 
 (
 *anpassas efter din senioritet och inriktning* 
 ):
   

  

* Regulatoriskt & GRC-spår: Genomföra GAP-analyser, riskbedömningar och forma ramverk, policyer och processer (t.ex. LIS) mot gällande standarder och lagkrav.
* Cybersäkerhets- & Operationsspår: Delta i eller leda implementationer av säkerhetskontroller, sårbarhetsanalyser samt planering och genomförande av incidenthanteringsövningar.
* Projekt & Leverans: Driva delmoment eller hålla i helhetsansvaret för komplexa leveranser samt agera rådgivare i kundens förändringsresor.
* Kommunikation: Översätta och pedagogiskt förmedla komplexa säkerhets-, risk- och compliancetekniska frågor till både tekniska specialister och affärsverksamhet/ledningsgrupper.


**Kompetenskrav:**
* Utbildning: Akademisk examen (Bachelor eller Master) inom cybersäkerhet, informationssäkerhet, GRC, systemvetenskap, juridik med IT-inriktning eller motsvarande kunskap förvärvad genom praktisk erfarenhet.
* Erfarenhetsnivå: Vi välkomnar både dig som är i början av din karriär (0–3 års erfarenhet) och dig som har hunnit bli senior rådgivare (5+ års erfarenhet). Rollen och ansvaret formas efter din profil.
* Standarder & Regelverk: Kännedom om (eller djup praktisk erfarenhet av) ramverk som ISO 27001-serien, NIS2 och GDPR.
* Hot-, Risk- & Teknikförståelse: En god förståelse för cyberhotlandskapet samt en teknisk eller regulatorisk orientering som gör dat du obehindrat kan föra en dialog med både säkerhetsarkitekter och verksamhetschefer.
* Kommunikation & Språk: Mycket god analytisk förmåga samt en osviklig förmåga att kommunicera och dokumentera affärsmässigt på både svenska och engelska.
* Integritet: Hög personlig integritet och pålitlighet, då rollen innefattar säkerhetsprövning.


**Meriterande** 
 (
 *Extra plus* 
 ):
   

  

* Erfarenhet eller starkt intresse för regulatorisk utveckling inom AI-säkerhet (t.ex. AI Act).
* Kännedom om eller erfarenhet av sektorsspecifika regelverk som DORA, PCI/DSS eller säkerhetsskyddslagen.
* Relevanta certifieringar för din nivå (t.ex. CISM, CISSP, CRISC, CISA eller liknande).


**💚 Humanit**
 Humanit handlar om att göra saker lite annorlunda, att på riktigt sätta våra anställda i fokus. Vi växer tillsammans och värdesätter engagemang och ambition. För oss är det viktigt att du får chansen att vara med och påverka vägen framåt.
   

  

 I utbyte erbjuder vi kompetens- och karriärutveckling genom varierande och utmanande uppdrag. Vi är inte branschinriktade och kan därför erbjuda en fantastisk variation bland uppdragen för dig som konsult. Självklart ser vi till att du får rätt utbildning och vi är väl medvetna om att det är det livslånga lärandet som bygger vår framgång.
   

  

 Tillsammans skapar vi framtiden 🚀
   

  

* Tillsvidareanställning med fast månadslön
* Kollektivavtal
* Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning, inklusive maxat friskvårdsbidrag
* Utvecklingsplan
* Hälsoförsäkring + pension
* Förskottssemester


**Start** 
 : Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid och när säkerhetskontroll är genomförd. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare.
   

  

**Plats** 
 : Stockholm
   

  

**Ansökan** 
 : Vi rekryterar löpande. Så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

***Sveriges 7:e bästa arbetsplats 2026!***
*Humanit arbetar tillsammans med Great Place To Work för att vi skall bli Sveriges bästa arbetsplats.*
**Och förresten:**
*Som en aktiv del i ett samhälle med kulturell och social mångfald är Humanit’s ambition att präglas av inkludering och bred representation, samt vara en arbetsplats med lika möjligheter för alla. Humanit anställer, bibehåller, befordrar och i övrigt behandlar alla medarbetare och kandidater efter erfarenhet, kvalifikationer och kompetens, oavsett kön, religion, ursprung, ålder, sexuell läggning, könsidentitet eller funktionsvariationer.*

title: Backend Developer in Digital Security
description:
**Are you passionate about digital security? We are looking for you!**
 In Swedbank you have the opportunity to:
   

  

* Analyse, design, develop, test and maintain services delivered by the team
* Ensure quality, accessibility and care when designing, building and maintaining software
* Work with architectural design in collaboration with architects
* Participate in a feedback culture where you both review and receive feedback to improve code quality
* Collaborate with the product owner, business analyst and other roles to refine and prioritise the product backlogs
* Handle maintenance and operations of our active services in accordance with existing processes
* Work in a value stream where Harmonize is our way of working


 What is needed in this role:
   

  

* 3-5 years of experience with Java and Spring Boot
* A good understanding of clean architecture, API design, microservices, and distributed systems
* A great team player with a collaborative mindset who works well in mob/pair programming
* Interest in adopting and experimenting with AI as a development tool
* Able to communicate efficiently in English
* A solution-oriented person with a customer-centric and business value driven mindset.
* Self- sufficient and self-organized with a desire to continuously improve.
* Capability to deliver in a changing and fast-moving environment.


 With us, you can experience:
   

  

* Personal and professional growth through self-leadership and continuous development.
* Meaningful work that positively impacts our workplace, our customers, and society.
* An open and collaborative culture that encourages cross-functional teamwork and provides networking opportunities.
* A supportive and inclusive environment that promotes a balanced and sustainable work-life, with flexible working conditions when suitable for the role.
* Benefits such as our share based reward program Eken, company pension plan, employee offer for banking products, health insurance.


 "Join our team and...
   

  

 become part of an inclusive and high‑performing team that constantly strives to improve how we work. We are responsible for Swedbank’s digital login methods, including BankID and fraud prevention in customer channels. Our mission is to ensure that every customer feels safe and confident when using Swedbank’s digital channels, a responsibility that truly drives us.
   

  

 Right now, we are focused on increasing efficiency, sharing our knowledge more broadly, and continuing to deliver at a consistently high level as a high‑performance team
 **” Tove Zander** 
 ,
 **your future manager**
 We look forward to receiving your application by 09.08.2026.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Recruiting manager:** 
 Tove Zander
   

  

 We may begin the selection during the application period, so we welcome your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 We would like to let you know that a background check and a drug test may be a part of the process for this role.
   

  

 We have made our choice regarding recruitment media and therefore kindly decline contact with ad sellers or sellers of other recruitment services.
   

  

 We want to inform you that the selection process may begin after the summer holidays.
   

  

**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**

title: Security Manager at Saab Naval
description:
Information Security Officer at Saab Naval
   

  

 Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.
   

  

 Your role
   

  

 Do you want to develop security at one of Sweden’s most high-tech companies? At Saab security is prioritized, on top management’s agenda and crucial for competitiveness, profitability and trust in a challenging global market.
   

  

 Saab Naval Security Department is looking for a Information Security Officer with responsibility towards our Business Unit (BU) Naval Combat Systems (NCS).
   

  

 Your operational role will be responsibility for information security matters and your main tasks are to support the BU in information security issues. As an Information Security Officer you will also build and strengthen a general security culture within the Business Units and develop security work based on external and internal security protection requirements.
   

  

 You will work closely with the entire Security Department but in particular with the other Security Managers at BU NCS. In addition to this you will liaise and collaborate extensively with other departments internally as well as externally.
   

  

 You will report to Head of Security Operations, Business Area Naval.
   

  

 Your main tasks will be:
   

  

* Coordinating security work at the Business Unit level, being the contact person for information security matters and support regarding classification and handling of information.
* Develop and maintain our information security policies
* Provide support regarding risk and information analysis and recommend relevant actions
* Ensuring regulatory compliance, such as continuously reviewing and evaluating applicable laws, regulations, requirements and agreements for the Business Unit
* Being the bridge between the Business Unit and authorities in information security-related matters


 Business Area Naval provides the most efficient platforms on and under the sea, both for the military and civilian domain. The portfolio covers submarines, surface ships, combat boats, under-surface vessels, torpedoes and more. Within Saab Security, we have anchored a Saab wide ambition to become world leading in security risk management and to be referred to by other security professionals as the company having the best practices in place.
   

  

 You will work primarily at our facility in Solna, Stockholm and support BU NCS and their operations there. We are a global company working in an international context meaning both domestic and international travel will be required.
   

  

**Your profile**
 To be successful in this role we believe you:
   

  

* Have a university degree or equivalent competence acquired through work-life experience, related to the Security domain and Information Security
* Are a socially skilled person who has an easy way of making contacts and cooperating inside and outside the company. You are comfortable in taking decisions and have a high degree of integrity
* Good communication skills in Swedish and English, verbal and written
* Have experience from working with security related legislation and legal frameworks


 We consider it an advantage if you:
   

  

* Have experience of information security both in the national and the international context e.g. ISO27´1 and CMMC
* Have experience in Swedish Protection Security Act
* Can take responsibility for your own area and you understand how your part contributes to the greater good
* Have several years of experience from working for government authorities or in a global company demanding an understanding of security related issues in the business process


 You are a true team player, and as such you focus on team results. Personal qualities will be of the outmost importance, and it is paramount that you are a trustworthy individual with strong ethics and personal integrity.
   

  

 You understand the need for balanced security in a business-driven environment. As an Information Security Officer at Saab Naval, you are likely to get in contact with classified information. This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.
   

  

 What you will be a part of
   

  

 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here.
   

  

 If you are interested in what benefits you can take part of as an employee at Saab in Sweden, you can read more about them here.
   

  

*Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.*

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.**
 At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead** 
 who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.
   

  

 As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities


**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.
   

  

**You also have:**
* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


**Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: API Platform Engineer
description:
*Vill du bygga nästa generations API-plattform i både moln- och on-prem-miljö? Som API Platform Engineer blir du en nyckelperson i vår satsning på moderna, datadrivna arbetssätt. Här får du arbeta nära utvecklingsteamen och skapa en robust, användarvänlig och högautomatiserad plattform som ger dem verklig självservice – med stor frihet, tydligt uppdrag och mycket teamwork.*
**Om jobbet**
 I vårt API-plattformsteam arbetar vi tillsammans för att skapa ett sammanhållet och effektivt erbjudande för API-hantering där självservice, automation och hög tillgänglighet står i centrum. Teamet består av produktägare, arkitekt och utvecklare i både Stockholm och Sundsvall, och präglas av mycket gemensamt arbete, kunskapsdelning och en kultur där vi uppmuntrar att testa nya arbetssätt. Målet är att ge våra utvecklingsteam en modern plattform, on-prem och i Azure, som gör det enkelt, säkert och snabbt att bygga och exponera API:er med hög grad av autonomi.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Förvalta och vidareutveckla vår API-plattform (Axway) som körs i Red Hat OpenShift.
* Etablera motsvarande API-förmågor i Azure med Azure API Management (APIM).
* Arbeta nära utvecklingsteamen och agera expertstöd i frågor kring API-hantering, integration och plattformsanvändning.
* Driva och utveckla automation, övervakning och användarupplevelsen.
* Underlätta och effektivisera onboarding av nya team och tjänster.
* Implementera och vidareutveckla CI/CD-pipelines för API-onboarding och deployment.
* Delta i incident- och problemhantering samt arbeta proaktivt med förbättringar.
* Samarbeta med andra plattformsteam för att säkerställa enhetliga och effektiva arbetssätt inom hela integrationslandskapet.


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst
   

  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT/systemutveckling eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med API- och integrationsplattformar, exempelvis Axway och/eller Azure API Management.
* God förståelse för containerbaserade miljöer samt erfarenhet av Red Hat OpenShift och/eller Azure.
* Erfarenhet av automation, övervakning och självservice-lösningar för utvecklingsteam.
* Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta CI/CD-pipelines, exempelvis i Azure DevOps.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


 Meriterande är även om du har
   

  

* Erfarenhet av autentisering och auktorisation inom API- och integrationslösningar.
* Förståelse för nätverk, säkerhet och övervakning i distribuerade miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av modernisering eller migrering av API- och integrationsplattformar.
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt, exempelvis SAFe.
* Erfarenhet från bank- eller försäkringsbranschen.


 Som person trivs du i en roll där du växlar mellan förvaltning och utveckling, och du tar gärna ansvar för att förenkla och förbättra sådant som kan göras bättre. Du samarbetar väl med både tekniska och verksamhetsnära roller och är ansvarstagande, proaktiv och har ett starkt eget driv. Du kommunicerar pedagogiskt och tydligt och kan förklara tekniska lösningar för olika målgrupper. Du tar initiativ, ser möjligheter till förbättring och bidrar gärna till att utveckla både teamet och våra lösningar. Du uppskattar en miljö där kunskapsdelning, innovation och samarbete står i centrum.
   

  

**Kontaktpersoner**
 Rekryterande chef: karin.segerstrom@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
**Xensam: Join the Future of SAM**
 Xensam is the leader in AI-powered, cloud-based Software Asset Management. Our technology brings clarity to complex IT environments, helping users make smart, data-driven decisions and maximize software ROI.
   

  

 Recognized with the Highest Growth Award and ranked #3 Overall Champion at the Main Software 50 Awards Nordics, we’re scaling fast and looking for people who want to join the journey. At Xensam, you play a key role in a team built on energy, focus, and positivity. We value experience, but even more, the person behind it.
   

  

 Together, we build the future of SAM.
   

  

**About The Role**
 About the role As a Cyber Security Engineer, you will be responsible for strengthening and protecting the organization’s security foundation. You will design and implement security controls, identify and mitigate risks, and ensure that critical systems remain resilient against evolving threats. This role blends hands-on technical work with strategic guidance, supporting teams across the organization in building and maintaining secure architectures and workflows. Your expertise will help drive strong security practices, improve defenses, and uphold a reliable and secure operational environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will develop and maintain the security controls that protect the organization’s systems, infrastructure, and data. You will monitor for threats, address vulnerabilities, and ensure that risks are identified and mitigated effectively. You’ll lead the investigation and management of security incidents, driving timely remediation and long-term improvements. Collaboration with engineering and operations teams will be essential, helping embed secure practices into architectures, workflows, and deployments. You will also contribute to security automation, maintain clear documentation, and support the adoption of strong and consistent security standards across the organization. You will be working with supporting Sales in customer meetings, acting as a cybersecurity authority, and overseeing certifications and platform audits.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Core experience**
* 5+ years in cybersecurity, application security, or security engineering
* Experience working with vulnerabilities in complex environments (cloud, infrastructure, or applications)
* Strong understanding of common vulnerability classes and attack techniques (e.g., OWASP Top 10)
* Ability to assess risk and make pragmatic security decisions in a business context


**Vulnerability management & ownership**
* Proven experience owning and driving a vulnerability management process end-to-end
* Strong ability to prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk, exploitability, and business impact
* Ability to define and improve processes, tooling, and workflows for vulnerability handling


**Developer & business collaboration**
* Acts as a trusted security partner for developers, supporting secure design and remediation
* Ability to support sales and customer-facing teams with security-related questions, questionnaires, and discussions
* Strong ability to translate technical findings into clear, business-relevant language


**Cloud, infrastructure, and AppSec**
* Experience securing cloud (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and on-prem environments with modern architectures
* Understanding of secure development practices, SDLC, and DevSecOps
* Familiarity with application security concepts and mitigation strategies
* Experience with threat modeling or security reviews is a plus


**Security operations & incident support**
* Understanding of security tooling such as vulnerability scanners, SIEM, or EDR/XDR
* Ability to support incident investigations by analyzing logs, identifying root cause, and contributing to remediation actions
* Experience helping drive improvements based on incidents and identified gaps


**Nice to have**
* Familiarity with frameworks such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, CIS, or similar
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CCSP, GIAC)


**What You Get**
* A generous work culture with free drinks and snacks, office massages, and more.
* Three days in-office (with remote work on Mondays and Fridays).
* An opportunity to shape your career growth while contributing to the company’s success.
* A dynamic position embracing "freedom under responsibility".
* If sales targets are met, all employees enjoy an annual destination trip.
* Other location-specific benefits.


**Our values at Xensam**
**Rebellious**
 We challenge the norm and act with initiative – always with responsibility.
   

  

**Humane**
 We foster a caring, inclusive environment that values diversity and respects individuality.
   

  

**Harmony**
 We value balance and create a supportive workplace where people thrive.
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks on final candidates to fulfill our commitments to customers and ensure a safe work environment.
   

  

 Xensam is the leading provider of AI-powered Software Asset Management technology. Designed to provide SAM Managers and IT Leaders with valuable data, our platform offers a wealth of features to simplify SAM workloads with built-in automation and advanced functionality. We prioritize ease of use and industry-leading security for both On-premise and Cloud software, putting organizations in total control of their hybrid IT environments.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom var och en av oss. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknologi, AI-drivna ansats, start-up-kultur och fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, ger vi dig förutsättningarna att nå din fulla potential och skapa värde för våra kunder. Med en stark drivkraft för kvalitet och agilitet stöttar vi dig genom hela din karriär så att du kan göra allt större avtryck och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som ML Engineer hos Sogeti blir du en del av vårt lokala team inom Data & AI. I rollen arbetar du med att utveckla, produktionssätta och vidareutveckla AI- och machine learning-lösningar i moderna molnplattformar som Azure eller AWS.
   

  

 Du hjälper våra kunder att gå från idé, data och experiment till robusta lösningar som skapar verkligt affärsvärde. Rollen kan omfatta allt från modellutveckling och MLOps till generativ AI, RAG-lösningar, AI-agenter och integration av AI-funktionalitet i befintliga system.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Utveckling, träning, utvärdering och optimering av machine learning-modeller.
* Produktionssättning av AI- och ML-lösningar som API:er, batchflöden eller integrerade delar av kundens system.
* Arbete med MLOps, modellversionering, deployment, monitorering och retraining.
* Utveckling av data- och feature pipelines tillsammans med Data Engineers.
* Användning av teknologier som Python, Azure Machine Learning, Databricks, MLflow, Docker, CI/CD och moderna molnplattformar.
* Utforskande av generativ AI, LLM:er, RAG, embeddings, vektordatabaser och AI-agenter.


**Din profil**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av Python-programmering och machine learning.
* Erfarenhet av modellutveckling, modellutvärdering, feature engineering och produktionssättning av ML- eller AI-lösningar.
* God förståelse för MLOps och modellens livscykel från träning till produktion.
* Erfarenhet av Git, CI/CD, Docker, SQL och moderna utvecklingsflöden.
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade AI-, ML- eller datalösningar i Azure och/eller AWS.
* Förmåga att samarbeta med Data Scientists, Data Engineers, utvecklare, arkitekter och verksamhet.
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift samt god professionell kunskap i engelska.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas** 
 .
   

  

* En kultur som präglas av närhet, samarbete och ett genuint kunskapsutbyte mellan kollegor
* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom data, AI och moderna dataplattformar – i uppdrag och genom tillgång till både lokala och globala kompetensnätverk
* Ett team där du får arbeta nära andra specialister inom data, analys och AI, i uppdrag som gör verklig skillnad för kund och samhälle


**Ansökan**
*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Just nu har vi semesterperiod och hoppas att även du njuter av en fin sommar. Vi ser framemot att läsa igenom din ansökan när vi är tillbaka från semester och förväntar oss att kunna återkoppla dig i augusti när vi är åter! Stort tack för ditt tålamod!*
**Om Sogeti**
 Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini Group, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, gör teknologi enkelt och värdeskapande. Vi är specialiserade på AI-drivna lösningar inom quality engineering & testing, data och cloud och förvandlar snabbt idéer till handling. Sogeti levererar konkreta resultat, hjälper organisationer att innovera med självförtroende och skapar värde från dag ett. Vi är agila, snabbrörliga och drar nytta av starka partnerskap. Våra lokala team arbetar sida vid sida med våra kunder och bygger nära relationer genom att förstå deras verklighet. Tillsammans med Capgemini-koncernens globala styrka och branschexpertis skapar vi skalbara resultat.
   

  

***Right here. Right now.***
 | www.sogeti.se

title: Regulatory Reporting Technical Analyst
description:
Brocc is a specialised financial institution embarking on a bold and transformative growth journey, fuelled by strong institutional backing and a clear strategic vision. Positioned at the forefront of the European credit market, Brocc combines deep heritage in consumer finance with cutting-edge technology, building a best-in-class credit platform that supports clients across the full credit lifecycle.
   

  

 With substantial capital resources, an ambitious growth agenda, and a collaborative, entrepreneurial culture, Brocc is uniquely placed to shape the future of the credit ecosystem. As we scale across new markets and asset classes, accurate, transparent, and well-governed regulatory reporting is central to how we operate, and to how we earn the trust of regulators, investors, and partners.
   

  

 Now, we’re looking for a Regulatory Reporting Technical Analyst to join our growing Finance/Treasury team and take ownership of the data and processes behind our FINREP, COREP, and related regulatory submissions.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 You’ll work closely with our Regulatory Reporting Lead to strengthen the data infrastructure behind Brocc’s regulatory reporting. In practice, that means:
   

  

* Map, investigate, and improve the end-to-end data flows feeding into regulatory reports such as FINREP and COREP
* Build and maintain reconciliation routines linking regulatory data to accounting records and ledger balances
* Develop and maintain Python and SQL code for data extraction, transformation, validation, and loading
* Provide hands-on technical support to the Regulatory Reporting Lead in preparing FINREP, COREP, and other submissions
* Collaborate with Accounting, Treasury, and Tech to ensure source data is clearly understood and consistently applied
* Contribute to documentation of data lineage and business logic, and support internal and external audit processes


**Who You Are**
 You’re comfortable working hands-on in SQL and Python, and you enjoy tracing a data problem back to its root cause. You don’t need a background in regulatory reporting — just a sharp analytical mind and the drive to make our data infrastructure better.
   

  

 More specifically, you bring:
   

  

* Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, Finance, Mathematics, or a related field
* Strong proficiency in SQL – comfortable writing and optimising queries across large relational datasets
* Strong proficiency in Python – including data manipulation (pandas), scripting, and building automated pipelines
* Some experience in a data engineering, analytics, or technical analyst role is welcome – recent graduates are equally encouraged to apply
* Prior experience in regulatory reporting or financial services is an advantage but not required
* A structured, detail-oriented, and analytical mindset, with the ability to trace complex data issues to root cause
* Comfortable working to fixed regulatory deadlines and managing competing priorities
* A collaborative, proactive approach, with the ability to communicate technical findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders


**Why Brocc?**
 You’ll join a dynamic, collaborative team with real opportunities for professional growth, in a fast-growing business that’s scaling across Europe. We work with a modern technology stack — including Snowflake, Sigma, and AI tools — and you’ll have real ownership in shaping the data and reporting infrastructure as we grow.
   

  

 Sound like you? We’d love to hear from you – send us your application and let’s talk.

title: Tech Procurement Coordinator
description:
Till vår area Digital Workplace söker vi nu en driven och strukturerad Tech Procurement Coordinator som kommer att vara spindeln i nätet för anskaffning av mjuk- och hårdvara inom Product & Tech.
   

  

 Tech-anskaffningar (såsom mjukvara, molntjänster och hårdvara) är tekniskt specifika och har livscykler som kräver hög hastighet. Det förutsätter en nära relation till verksamheten. Genom att vara en integrerad del av Product & Tech kommer du att vara med och påverka direkt från planeringsfasen.
   

  

 Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden
   

  

 I rollen som Tech Procurement Manager har du ett helhetsansvar för tech-organisationens alla inköp, där du säkrar ett aktivt processtöd och arbetar nära verksamheten strategiskt. Genom att skapa överskådlighet bidrar du till att planera inköp i nära anslutning till tech-organisationens budgetarbete. Du etablerar tech-organisationen som en obligatorisk remissinstans vid alla tech-relaterade anförskaffningar för att säkerställa att nya lösningar alltid möter våra interna standarder.
   

  

 En central del av ditt uppdrag är att agera Single Point of Contact (SPOC). Du blir bryggan mellan tech-organisationen och externa leverantörer, samt mellan tech och centrala inköp. På så sätt kortar du ledtider, höjer kvaliteten på underlag och avlastar samtliga parter.
   

  

**Vidare Kommer Du Att**
* Leda vårt Tech Procurement Forum för att säkerställa framdrift och samarbete.
* Säkerställa regelefterlevnad för alla inköp inom tech-organisationen och uppfylla den centrala inköpsfunktionens krav.
* Säkerställa en strukturerad riskhanteringsprocess där risker kopplade till avtal, mjukvara och IT-säkerhet identifieras, dokumenteras och eskaleras till rätt beslutsinstans.
* Kontinuerligt dokumentera olika arbetsflöden och steg i processen för att förtydliga och förbättra vårt arbetssätt.


 Din profil
   

  

 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har en utmärkt kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga. Eftersom du kommer att röra dig i gränssnittet mellan tech, inköp och externa leverantörer är du skicklig på att bygga relationer, förstå tekniska krav och hantera olika intressenter och stakeholders på ett smidigt sätt.
   

  

 Som person har du dessutom en hög analytisk förmåga. Du motiveras av att sätta dig in i komplexa avtal och processer, och du har ett naturligt strukturerat arbetssätt. Du är noggrann, och trivs med att driva ditt arbete framåt självständigt, samtidigt som du behåller helhetsperspektivet i en föränderlig miljö.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen "Ansök" nedan. Urvalet sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Har du några frågor kring tjänsten? Välkommen att kontakta Lucia Larsson, Area Lead på Digital Workplace lucia.larsson@avanza.se.
   

  

**OBS! I och med semestertider kommer vår återkoppling att dröja lite, och vi beräknar att titta närmare på din ansökan i början av augusti. Tack för ditt tålamod och varmt välkommen med din ansökan och ha en fin sommar!**
 Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt kontakt från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare.
   

  

 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 16 år i rad.

title: Technical Product Owner (Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations)
description:
We're working with a large Nordic organisation in Stockholm embarking on a major digital transformation, with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations at the heart of its future technology landscape. This is a genuine greenfield implementation, giving you the opportunity to shape the platform, influence business processes and own the long-term roadmap from day one.
 



  





**What you'll be doing** 




 As the Product Owner, you'll take ownership of the Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations platform throughout its implementation and beyond. Working closely with business stakeholders, IT leadership and an experienced implementation partner, you'll ensure the platform delivers long-term value while remaining scalable, supportable and aligned with business objectives.
 



 Your responsibilities will include:
 


* Owning the product roadmap, backlog and priorities for the D365 Finance & Operations platform.
* Acting as the key link between the business and the implementation partner.
* Defining and prioritising business requirements alongside finance and operational stakeholders.
* Driving process improvements and platform standardisation across finance, with future expansion into additional business areas.
* Making informed decisions around standard functionality versus customisation.
* Overseeing related technologies including Power Platform, integrations, automation and third-party solutions.
* Helping shape the long-term platform strategy, governance and future development roadmap.



  





**Why consider this opportunity?** 



* Join a genuine greenfield Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations implementation.
* Shape the platform from the very beginning rather than inheriting previous decisions.
* Significant influence over product strategy, governance and technology direction.
* Work alongside senior business stakeholders on a business-critical transformation programme.
* Long-term ownership of a modern Microsoft business platform with excellent future development opportunities.



  





**Must have** 



* 5+ years' experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations.
* Strong understanding of finance and ERP business processes.
* Experience delivering ERP implementations or large-scale transformation programmes.
* Ability to translate business requirements into scalable technology solutions.
* Strong stakeholder management skills and experience working across both business and technical teams.
* Comfortable making decisions around platform design, standard functionality and future development.



  





**Nice to have** 



* Previous Product Owner, Platform Owner or ERP Manager experience.
* Experience with Microsoft Power Platform.
* Understanding of Azure integrations and Microsoft's wider business applications ecosystem.



  





 If you're looking for an opportunity where you can genuinely influence the future of a Microsoft Dynamics platform, rather than simply maintaining one, we'd be happy to tell you more.

title: Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9
description:
**About us @Symphony**
 Secure. Connected. Intelligent.
   

  

 Symphony is an AI-powered communication and technology company fueled by interconnected platforms: messaging, voice, directory and analytics.
   

  

 Our end-to-end encrypted technologies enable over 1,400 institutions to accelerate AI impact, prioritize data security, navigate complex regulatory compliance and optimize business interactions.
   

  

**Role Description**
 The Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9 (CTO) is a highly strategic and technical leader responsible for defining and executing the technology vision, product architecture, engineering strategy, security framework, and innovation roadmap for Cloud9 Trader Voice. Cloud9 Trader Voice is Symphony's cloud-native, full-featured turret replacement that delivers secure, resilient voice and collaboration solutions for the global trading community connecting 20k users across 900 firms.
   

  

 This critical leadership role leads a global team of highly skilled employees and is accountable for building and scaling a world-class technology organization that delivers secure, resilient, low-latency, and highly available voice and collaboration solutions for financial markets participants. The CTO will align technology investments with commercial goals, product roadmap, regulatory requirements, and customer needs, acting as a bridge between technical execution, commercial strategy and clients. Serving as a key member of the operating leadership team, the CTO will be a trusted advisor to Symphony’s CEO, COO, CIO, and executive team on technology strategy, cyber risk, infrastructure resilience, and investment planning.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Leadership & Strategy
   

  

* Define and communicate the long-term technology vision and roadmap for the Cloud9 platform, aligned with company strategy and growth objectives.
* Partner with the Cloud9 Head of Product and Cloud9 Head of Sales to align technical goals and execution with business objectives.
* Identify and direct technical innovations that create new market opportunities.


 Technical Transformation
   

  

* Lead the overall technical strategy towards modern user interface design and deployment technologies
* Provide strong technical guidance to meet stringent availability and security requirements
* Own and evolve the technical roadmap in tight collaboration with the architecture and infrastructure teams
* Mandate and execute an AI-centric augmented engineering strategy to modernize aging code, automate quality assurance, and minimize technical debt.


 Engineering & Delivery Excellence
   

  

* Lead global software engineering, architecture, DevOps, QA, and technical operations teams.
* Provide technical guidance to maintain high system availability and functionality for this mission critical product.
* Implement AI-powered automated test systems to guarantee the accuracy and reliability of mission-critical voice trading interactions.
* Maintain and enhance modern software development practices (CI/CD, agile delivery, observability, and release governance)
* Monitor, measure and improve engineering velocity, quality, predictability, and time-to-market.


 Reliability, Security & Risk Management
   

  

* In close partnership with CISO, own Cloud9 cybersecurity strategy, secure development lifecycle, and incident response readiness.
* Ensure platform resilience, disaster recovery, business continuity, and high-availability architecture.
* Maintain compliance with applicable regulatory, privacy, and data retention obligations relevant to financial markets customers.
* Own leadership response during major incidents and customer-impacting events.


 Engineering Leadership & Talent
   

  

* Act as the bridge across global engineering sites
* Recruit, mentor, and lead high-performing engineering teams while implementing scalable development practices.
* Lead organizational design, succession planning, and talent development across technology functions.


 Customer & Market Leadership
   

  

* Engage directly with strategic customers, regulators, partners, and prospects as the senior technology representative.
* Monitor competitor capabilities and market trends to inform roadmap priorities.


**Required Qualifications**
* 20+ years experience in technology/engineering, including 10+ years in engineering management leading multiple global functions.
* Proven success as a CTO, VP Engineering, or senior technology leader in a B2B SaaS, fintech, communications, or regulated technology environment.
* Must have trading floor systems experience, demonstrated deployments, and global experience in capital markets.
* Proven success in leading large-scale architectural transformations.
* Strong track record delivering mission-critical, high-availability platforms with demanding uptime and performance requirements.
* Experience with complex systems spanning cloud based operations, deployed hardware and remote management.
* Extensive experience with Linux/Windows production workloads and deep knowledge of cloud technology.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience aligning product and technology investments to revenue growth.
* Exceptional communication skills and experience presenting to Boards, investors, enterprise customers, and senior stakeholders.


 Education
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related engineering field.


**Preferred Experience**
* Knowledge of realtime communications, media and voice systems, recording, surveillance, or unified communications platforms.
* Experience with acquisitions, post-merger integration, or international expansion.
* Familiarity with AI/ML use cases in workflow automation, analytics, or customer experience.


**Compensation**
* Salary Range: SEK: 840,000 - 1,600,000 base salary per year
* Bonus Plan


**Benefits And Perks**
* Regional specific competitive benefits
* Build your own Benefits (BYOB) perk
* Local events, team building, and development opportunities


 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment.

title: Onsite Technician - AV Devices
description:
**About Wipro** 




  





 Wipro Limited (NYSE: WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our clients, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever-changing world.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




  





**Position:** 
 Onsite Technician- AV & Conference Room Services
 



**Location:** 
 Sodertalje, Sweden
 



  





 We are looking for an Onsite AV & Conference Room Technician to support and maintain audio-visual (AV) equipment in conference rooms.
