title: Fullstackutvecklare till Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset
description:
Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset söker en senior systemutvecklare för att stärka utvecklingen inom precisionsmedicin, med fokus på systemstöd för medicinska diagnostikflöden. Uppdraget genomförs i nära samarbete med hälsoinformatiker och omfattar vidareutveckling av lösningar för hantering av labbprover, beställningar, svar och genomikdata.
   

  

 Arbetet präglas av höga krav på datakvalitet, spårbarhet, informationsflöden och integration mellan system. Konsulten förväntas arbeta självständigt, driva tekniska lösningar framåt och bidra på en övergripande nivå i design och koordinering.
   

  

 Omfattning och upplägg
   

  

* Start: preliminärt 2026-08-21
* Omfattning: 100%
* Längd: till 2026-12-31, med möjlighet till förlängning
* Plats: Karolinska i Solna (upp till 50% distans möjligt)


 Krav (ska-krav)
   

  

* Erfarenhet som systemutvecklare i webbaserade lösningar
* Erfarenhet av frontendutveckling i moderna JavaScript-ramverk (t.ex. React) inkl. UI/UX
* Erfarenhet av backendutveckling i moderna plattformar (t.ex. .NET, Java eller likvärdigt)
* Minst två relevanta referensuppdrag av liknande omfattning och komplexitet
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt, ta ansvar och hantera dialog med både interna och externa intressenter


 Mervärden (bör-krav)
   

  

* Erfarenhet från vård, diagnostik eller laboratorienära verksamhet med fokus på datakvalitet och informationsflöden
* Erfarenhet av containerplattformar (t.ex. Kubernetes eller OpenShift)
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD och moderna utvecklingsflöden


**NÄR DU BLIR PARTNER**
 Som partnerkonsult hos Wise kliver du in i en gemenskap där samarbete är kärnan. Du får möjlighet att arbeta med några av marknadens mest intressanta uppdrag, i organisationer där både människor och teknik är i centrum. För oss är det avgörande att du känner dig trygg och värdesatt i vårt samarbete. Vi stöttar dig, coachar dig och finns med dig hela vägen genom uppdraget. Hos oss är du inte bara konsult – du blir en del av en större helhet.
   

  

**OM WISE IT**
 Wise IT är specialister på rekrytering, konsultlösningar och strategisk kompetensmatchning inom IT och tech. Teknik förändras snabbt , men med rätt person på rätt plats får du kontroll på framtiden. Vi matchar människor med skarp teknisk kompetens och förmågan att förstå helheten. Resultatet? IT som fungerar i praktiken, inte bara i teorin. Vi ser till att du inte bara följer utvecklingen utan driver den.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vänta därför inte med din ansökan.

title: Senior Applied Scientist, Operations Research
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 Our Applied Scientists at Wolt build and deploy Applied Science and Machine Learning solutions to address a wide variety of challenging business problems. Utilizing a spectrum of methodologies including statistical analysis, machine learning, deep learning, and operations research, they improve critical processes within Wolt's online delivery platform and business operations. Their contributions significantly impact all 31 countries in which we operate.
   

  

 The work consists of owning applied science use cases as part of a product development team; starting from identifying opportunities, to developing and prototyping a solution, all the way to supporting its deployment, monitoring, and improving it in production. We use a variety of technologies and tools including Python, SQL, Snowflake, Flyte, MLflow and Seldon Core to get the job done, and are constantly looking for ways to improve how our applied scientists work.
   

  

 We are looking for an Applied Scientist specialized in Operations Research to be embedded into our cross-functional Logistics Assignments team. Together with other operations researchers, software engineers, and product, design and analytics people, you would develop algorithms and solutions for efficiently assigning tasks to our Courier Partners. Our task assignments engine is at the core of our logistics system. This is a unique opportunity to work on challenging operations research problems at a large scale. You will have great potential to make a significant impact by tackling complex problems and building new solutions to improve the efficiency of our logistics operations and, hence, our business.
   

  

 📍This role can be based in one of our tech hubs in
 **Helsinki, Berlin, or Stockholm** 
 .
   

  

 Our humble expectations
   

  

* Solid experience in Operations Research and production-level Applied Science projects, with the ability and interest to own solutions end-to-end: from prototyping to deployment, maintenance, and continuous improvement.
* Deep understanding of Operations Research principles and a strong foundation in statistics.
* Proven ability to work in highly complex domains, break down challenging problems into manageable parts, and develop innovative solutions. Comfortable explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
* Experience within logistics, optimization, or operational research domains is highly valued.
* Knowledge of experimental design and analysis, including A/B testing.
* Strong engineering skills with fluent coding ability in Python (our primary language for Applied Science projects) and experience working with databases (SQL). Experience with C++ or Go is a plus.
* You value good software engineering practices, understand MLOps, and take pride in the quality of your code and the performance of your solutions.
* Ideally, a degree in a field related to Operations Research or Applied Science.
* Analytical, curious, business-oriented, and proactive mindset, with the ability to independently drive work forward while collaborating effectively with stakeholders across teams.


 Next steps
   

  

 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!
   

  

 The compensation will be a negotiable combination of monthly pay and DoorDash RSUs. The latter makes it exceptionally easy to be excited about our company growing and doing well, as you’ll own a piece of the pie.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Senior AI Tech Consultant - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core technology issues of leading global companies!
   

  

 Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for Senior AI Tech Consultants to collaborate with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or The Boston Consulting Group on national and international client projects! You will be independently structuring project modules and supporting junior project members. Together with our clients, you will develop superior IT strategies, concepts, and solutions actively and on site, applying your sound technical know-how, your understanding of business contexts, and your analytical and conceptual skills.
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* completed a university degree in computer science, informatics, engineering, business or a related field with higher-than-average grades
* bring approx. four years relevant experience in IT consulting, in the course of which you ran transformation and implementation projects in terms of both strategy and operations
* have led project teams of more than three people
* know exactly what the buzzwords machine learning, cyber resilience, DevOps, agile, AI, and robotics mean
* are familiar with all the stages of development for successful IT organizations and IT processes.
* know exactly how to put together complex business cases
* feel particularly comfortable in interdisciplinary teams and global contexts and are flexible and willing to travel
* are on a fluent level of understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* Form the digital transformation of globally leading companies while maintaining a clear view of overall technical solutions and client circumstances
* Drive groundbreaking projects forward by using agile methods and modern approaches within the scope of strategic IT implementation for clients and by actively steering the relevant modules
* Smooth the path for tailored, future-oriented customer journeys based on precise analysis of the situation and with current market developments and trends such as machine learning in mind
* Design and optimize unique IT architectures within the framework of enterprise solution requirements, modern custom software developments, and sustainable digital solutions, including cyber resilience


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we nurture a strong and close team network beyond our case work.
   

  

*#BCGPlatinion*
 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.
   

  

 BCG is an E - Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E-Verify.

title: Sales Specialist
description:
**Introduction to Eficode**
 We’re building the future of software development - driving innovation across Cloud, DevOps, Agile, Service Management, and AI-powered transformation. Our mission is to help organizations evolve into truly software-driven enterprises, empowering them to deliver faster, smarter, and more sustainably through modern technology and intelligent automation.
   

  

 At Eficode, we help some of the world’s leading organisations modernise the way they build software by combining DevOps culture, platform engineering, AI-assisted software development, and cloud-native tooling. From intelligent automation to agentic workflows and AI-enhanced SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) practices, we are at the forefront of helping teams transform how software is delivered.
   

  

 As an Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner, we have been recognised multiple times as Atlassian Partner of the Year, most recently for Software Solutions, 2026. We are also proud to be a two-time GitHub Partner of the Year in EMEA, a GitLab Select Partner, and an Azure Managed Service Provider.
   

  

 With over 600 experts across 10 countries, we bring together leading talent from the Nordics, continental Europe, the UK, and the Americas.
   

  

**Role purpose**
 As a Sales Specialist at Eficode, you will play a key role in driving growth across our strategic solution areas by combining strong commercial acumen with a solid understanding of modern technology ecosystems.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with regional sales teams, solution consultants, marketing, and delivery teams to identify and close new business opportunities, helping customers understand how Eficode’s services and solutions can support their transformation journeys.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced sales environments, enjoys building relationships and creating opportunities, and is excited by the evolving world of Cloud, DevOps, AI-powered software development, and modern enterprise tooling.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
 Your main responsibilities as our Sales Specialist will include (but won’t be limited to):
   

  

* Owning and achieving individual sales quotas across designated solution areas, including both shadow quotas and full quotas for new business opportunities
* Working closely with regional account managers and marketing teams to identify, qualify, and close strategic opportunities
* Developing and maintaining strong relationships with strategic technology partners and vendors, identifying joint go-to-market opportunities and leveraging partner ecosystems to drive pipeline growth
* Building tailored customer proposals, presentations, and solution positioning aligned to customer needs and business goals
* Acting as a trusted advisor and subject matter expert across assigned solution areas
* Collaborating with pre-sales and delivery teams to scope, position, and package offerings that balance customer value with commercial success
* Maintaining accurate pipeline management and forecasting within CRM systems
* Driving pipeline growth and supporting cross-sell and upsell opportunities across the Eficode portfolio
* Representing Eficode at customer meetings, events, webinars, and industry engagements as a solution evangelist
* Building and maintaining strong relationships across customer and partner networks


**Role Requirements**
 You will make a great match for this role if you have:
   

  

* Previous experience working within B2B SaaS sales, IT consulting sales, or enterprise software licensing environments
* Experience selling cloud, SaaS, or consumption-based licensing solutions
* A strong hunter mentality, with experience generating and closing new business opportunities
* Experience working with enterprise customers and navigating complex sales cycles
* A solid understanding of modern software development ecosystems, cloud platforms, or DevOps-related technologies
* Excellent communication and relationship-building skills in English
* A proactive, commercially driven, and collaborative mindset
* The ability to work cross-functionally with sales, technical, marketing, and delivery teams
* An established professional network within relevant markets or industries


**Nice To Have’s**
 It would be an added bonus if you have:
   

  

* Experience working with Atlassian, GitHub, GitLab, AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, or DevOps toolchains
* Experience selling or working with large enterprise platforms such as ServiceNow, Salesforce, or Workday
* Previous experience working in consultancy or partner-led sales environments
* Knowledge of AI-powered software development, cloud transformation, or platform engineering concepts
* Swedish or Danish language skills for customer-facing work would be beneficial


**Location & Setup**
* You’ll work in a hybrid setup, with remote working flexibility while also having access to our Scandinavian offices for collaboration and team connection.
* Occasional travel across Scandinavia to Eficode offices and customer sites is part of the role
* This is a full-time position with typical office hours and flexibility where needed
* The role reports to the Head of Account Management Scandinavia
* Possible locations: Stockholm,, Malmö, or Copenhagen
* Compensation includes a market-based salary with a commission plan (OTE model)


**How To Apply**
 If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we’d love to hear from you - apply today!
   

  

 A member of our Talent Acquisition team will review your application and, if your profile is a match, will be in contact to organise an initial screening call. If you are not selected to move forward in the process, we will also make sure to keep you informed.
   

  

**What’s in it for you?**
 Eficode offer a range of perks and benefits for employees, including:
   

  

* Generous paid holiday
* Health insurance & pension scheme
* Learning & development - We have knowledge sharing sessions, team activities, technical and soft skills trainings to all Eficodeans in our Academy.
* Regular social events, lunches and code camps
* A work laptop, phone and necessary work equipment


 To find out more about life at Eficode, and hear what our people think about us, click here.
   

  

**Application process**
 If this role sounds like a good fit, we encourage you to apply today. Selected candidates will be invited to an initial screening call with our Talent Acquisition team. The process then includes two interviews, followed by a final informal team coffee - giving you the chance to get to know your future colleagues and experience the team culture firsthand.
   

  

**DEI Statement**
 At Eficode we are committed to offering an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all applicants. We are dedicated to creating a work environment that embraces diversity, inclusion, and respect for all employees. We believe that our differences make us better. We recognise that by having diverse perspectives, skills, ages, genders, backgrounds, and cultures, we will better drive our customers forward and innovate in our field.
   

  

 To ensure a fair recruitment process, please refrain from sharing unnecessary personal information or an image of yourself in your job application.
   

  

**Salary Development**
 At Eficode, we believe your compensation should reflect the impact you make and how you grow along the way. Your salary develops through regular check-ins with your team lead, where we look at things like your skills, experience, client work, feedback, and overall contribution — both to your projects and to our culture. As a consultancy, it’s natural that factors like time spent on billable client work are part of the picture — but so are your development, collaboration, and everyday efforts that drive value. We also carry out a company-wide salary review once a year.
   

  

 On top of your salary, we offer a broad mix of benefits, both financial and non-financial, to support your well-being, work-life balance, and professional growth.
   

  

 Find out more about our benefits [here].
   

  

**Beware of recruitment scams**
 Eficode never asks for payment, bank details, or sensitive personal information during the recruitment process. We only communicate through official Eficode email accounts and approved recruitment platforms. If you receive an unsolicited message, job offer, or request for personal or financial information claiming to be from Eficode, it may be fraudulent.

title: Sr Machine Learning & AI Engineer
description:
**ABOUT SINCH**

Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 200,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.


Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.


At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**DESCRIPTION**

This role develops and operates large scale Machine Learning models to detect and prevent fraud, owning the full ML lifecycle from experimentation to production. You will build scalable pipelines, ensure system reliability in high volume environments, and collaborate with engineering and product teams to evolve the Anti-Fraud platform.


* Design, train, and deploy production grade ML models, including text classification, anomaly detection, and image classification.
* Own the full ML lifecycle, from experimentation and validation to deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
* Build and maintain scalable data pipelines for preprocessing, validation, and transformation of large datasets.
* Ensure ML systems are reliable, observable, and scalable in high volume production environments.
* Collaborate closely with Engineering, Product, and Anti-Fraud teams from problem definition to delivery.
* Implement and optimize ML algorithms using Python and frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit learn.
* Optimize model and system performance in cloud environments, particularly AWS.
* Promote best practices in experimentation, reproducibility, monitoring, and documentation.

**REQUIREMENTS**

* Experience building and deploying ML systems in production.
* Strong Python skills and hands on experience with ML libraries (Scikit learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch).
* Experience with large scale data processing frameworks (e.g., Databricks, Spark).
* Experience designing and maintaining production ML pipelines.
* Solid understanding of system design, scalability, and reliability.
* Experience with cloud platforms (preferably AWS).
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work autonomously.
* Advanced or fluent English.

**Big Plus:**

* Experience with large scale text classification, anomaly detection, or image classification.
* Background in fraud detection or high risk/high volume environments.
* Familiarity with orchestration tools (Airflow, Dagster).
* Experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience working with Lakehouse architecture.

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in **English** .


**OUR HIRING PROCESS**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/ . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!


**Salary:**

The monthly salary for this position is between SEK 55,000 – SEK 70,000. Factors which may affect pay within this range may include skills, education, experience, and other qualifications.
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Global Marketing & Communications Specialist
description:
Are you passionate about creating communication that makes complex technical solutions easy to understand and shows clear customer value? We are looking for a creative and business-minded Global Marketing & Communications Specialist to strengthen how our Service Division communicates its value to customers and internal stakeholders worldwide. In this role, you will help make service offers more visible, relevant and easy to activate across markets - supporting Customer Centers – our local sales and service organisations - in showing how service contributes to customer value and sustainable business growth.
  
  

Your role
  
In this role, you will help shape how we communicate the value of service in a global B2B environment. You will connect global strategy with local execution, working closely with Product Managers and Customer Centers to translate complex service and product offerings into clear, consistent and customer-focused messaging.
  
  

You will
  
Plan, coordinate and execute global B2B marketing communication activities, ensuring consistency while enabling local adaptation
  
Translate complex service and product offerings into clear value propositions, customer-focused messaging and high-quality assets
  
Collaborate with Product Managers, product marketing colleagues and Customer Centers to create aligned, value-driven communication
  
Produce and maintain marketing assets such as presentations, web content, videos, social media material and campaign content
  
Use insights, data and digital channels to continuously improve content performance and activation
  
  

You report to the Global Marketing and Communications Manager for the Service Division.
  
To succeed, you will need
  
You are a strong communicator with a structured, collaborative and curious mindset. You enjoy turning complex solutions into clear messages, working across cultures and driving initiatives forward. With creativity, curiosity, analytical thinking and a tech‑savvy approach - always with the customer in focus - you create communication that makes an impact.
  
  

**In addition we believe you have:**  

Experience in marketing communications, preferably in a B2B environment or agency setting
  
Experience collaborating across functions, countries or stakeholders - ideally in a global or decentralized organization
  
Strong writing skills and the ability to translate technical solutions into clear customer value
  
Experience working with digital channels and content performance; experience with tools such as Adobe AEM, Adobe Creative Cloud, social media platforms, SEO, AI search visibility, Google Analytics or SharePoint is beneficial
  
Fluency in English, spoken and written; additional languages are a plus
  
  

We encourage you to apply even if you don't meet every single requirement. We value diverse experiences and perspectives and are excited to see what you bring to the role.
  
In return, we offer
  
At Atlas Copco, you will join a global and collaborative environment where ideas, trust and continuous improvement matter. You will have the opportunity to grow your marketing communications expertise, work with international stakeholders and contribute to communication that supports real business impact.
  
Job location
  
This role offers a hybrid working arrangement, allowing you to split your time between working remotely and being on-site at our office in Stockholm, Sweden (SE).
  
  

Uniting curious minds
  
Behind every innovative solution, there are people working together to transform the future. With careers sparked by initiative and lifelong learning, we unite curious minds, and you could be one of them.
company_description: Atlas Copco provides compressed air and gas equipment, industrial power tools, construction equipment, and industrial vacuum equipment, as well as service and maintenance. www.atlascopco.com

title: Payroll Specialist for Sweden
description:
Join us on a journey of endless possibilities
  
At Strada , possibility isn’t just a promise – it’s the foundation of everything we do. We believe in unlocking potential for every colleague, creating a journey of growth, discovery, and impact.
  
With the support, resources, and opportunities we provide, you’ll build a fulfilling future – working on meaningful projects that span industries and regions, contributing to outcomes that matter.
  
Strada is a people, payroll, and technology leader simplifying international workforce management. Operating in 180+ countries, we design and deliver people-first solutions powered by cloud-based technology – helping organizations grow and enabling workforces to perform at their best.
  
Learn more at www.stradaglobal.com
  
  

**In this job you will:**  

Support Managers with client Strada engagement ensuring all information is accurate and provided on time
  
Provide support and guidance for all implementations and go-lives
  
Be responsible for the maintenance of the Client Solution workbook. As well as updating, maintaining and enforcing of documented processes, such as the Defined Work Instructions (DWI). And support the review of the Statement of Works before its shared with the Client to ensure its fit for purpose
  
Responsible for the resolution of Technical/Functional issues escalated from the team. You will ensure that all system issues are reported correctly and tickets are logged with the necessary details to support their solution.
  
Responsible for the management of the legislation roadmap and ensuring the team are upskilled in upcoming changes, and that processes are updated when needed. You will also support the Year End processes.
  
  

In this role success will measured on such things as
  
Reduction of client escalations through knowledge transfer to both the client and payroll team
  
Adherence to all Security and Compliance procedures, and quality standards
  
100% Attainment of customer SLA agreements
  
Adoption of innovation initiatives
  
  

We are looking for you with
  
Strong knowledge of the various inputs and outputs such as third party interfaces, timekeeping, tax filing/compliance, benefits and other key areas that integrate with payroll
  
Ability to identify and mitigate risks in the payroll process
  
3-4 years relevant experience administering Payroll in an HR consulting, HR Outsourcing or Corporate environment
  
Expert knowledge on payroll processes, practices and associated legislation
  
A valid Swedish Bank-ID
  
Excellent written and verbal skills in Swedish and a good level of English
  
Strong knowledge of MS Office tools such as Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
  
A willingness to learn, self-going attitude and the ability to work well in teams as well as on your own
  
BA/BS in a business-related field such as Accounting, Human Resources, Business Administration, or equivalent combination of education & experience
  
It would be a benefit if you have
  
**HRIS knowledge:** Workday, SAP, or PeopleSoft knowledge preferred, HrX and Strada Pay
  
Payroll certifications
  
  

**At Strada, our values guide everything we do:**  

Anticipate Customer Needs – We stay ahead of trends so our customers can grow and succeed.
  
Own the Outcome – We take responsibility for delivering excellence and ensuring things get done right.
  
Challenge Ourselves to Work Smarter – We move faster than the world around us to drive change and accomplish more.
  
Empower Each Other to Solve Problems – We tackle challenges head on, ask tough questions, and collaborate to find the best solutions.
  
Care About Our Work – We understand that what we do impacts millions, and we have a responsibility to get it right.
  
  

Benefits
  
At Strada, we support your whole self—offering a range of benefits for your health, wellbeing, finances, and future. These include health coverage, wellbeing programs, paid leave (vacation, sick, parental), retirement plans, learning opportunities, and more.
  
All offers are contingent on successful completion of background checks, where permitted by law and as appropriate for the role. These may include identity, education, employment, and in some cases, criminal history verification, checks against global watchlists, credit reports, and/or drug testing. You’ll be informed of the specific checks applicable to your role and location during the recruitment process.
  
  

Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
  
Strada is dedicated to fostering a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and supported. We believe that embracing differences strengthens our teams and drives innovation and success.
  
  

Diversity Policy Statement
  
Strada is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination based on legally protected characteristics. We provide reasonable accommodations for disabilities and religious practices. Applicants may request reasonable accommodation by contacting their recruiter.
  
  

Authorization to work in the Employing Country
  
To be considered, you must have current and future work authorization in the country where you're applying, without the need for visa sponsorship by Strada.
  
**Please note:** This job description does not limit Strada’s right to assign or reassign responsibilities, including to subsidiaries, partners, or future business purchasers.
  
  

We offer you a competitive total rewards package, continuing education & training, and tremendous potential with a growing worldwide organization.
  
  

**DISCLAIMER:**  

Nothing in this job description restricts management's right to assign or reassign duties and responsibilities of this job to other entities; including but not limited to subsidiaries, partners, or purchasers of Strada business units. .
company_description: At Strada we blend human ingenuity with next-gen technology to deliver end-to-end payroll, human capital and financial management solutions to organizations worldwide.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
* Permanent
* Executives
* Data & AI
* ID 502969-en\_US
På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom var och en av oss. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknologi, AI-drivna ansats, start-up-kultur och fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, ger vi dig förutsättningarna att nå din fulla potential och skapa värde för våra kunder. Med en stark drivkraft för kvalitet och agilitet stöttar vi dig genom hela din karriär så att du kan göra allt större avtryck och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.


**Om rollen**


Som ML Engineer hos Sogeti blir du en del av vårt lokala team inom Data & AI. I rollen arbetar du med att utveckla, produktionssätta och vidareutveckla AI- och machine learning-lösningar i moderna molnplattformar som Azure eller AWS.  

  

  



Du hjälper våra kunder att gå från idé, data och experiment till robusta lösningar som skapar verkligt affärsvärde. Rollen kan omfatta allt från modellutveckling och MLOps till generativ AI, RAG-lösningar, AI-agenter och integration av AI-funktionalitet i befintliga system.  

  

  



*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*  

  



* Utveckling, träning, utvärdering och optimering av machine learning-modeller.
* Produktionssättning av AI- och ML-lösningar som API:er, batchflöden eller integrerade delar av kundens system.
* Arbete med MLOps, modellversionering, deployment, monitorering och retraining.
* Utveckling av data- och feature pipelines tillsammans med Data Engineers.
* Användning av teknologier som Python, Azure Machine Learning, Databricks, MLflow, Docker, CI/CD och moderna molnplattformar.
* Utforskande av generativ AI, LLM:er, RAG, embeddings, vektordatabaser och AI-agenter.
  

  

**Din profil**

* Flerårig erfarenhet av Python-programmering och machine learning.
* Erfarenhet av modellutveckling, modellutvärdering, feature engineering och produktionssättning av ML- eller AI-lösningar.
* God förståelse för MLOps och modellens livscykel från träning till produktion.
* Erfarenhet av Git, CI/CD, Docker, SQL och moderna utvecklingsflöden.
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade AI-, ML- eller datalösningar i Azure och/eller AWS.
* Förmåga att samarbeta med Data Scientists, Data Engineers, utvecklare, arkitekter och verksamhet.
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift samt god professionell kunskap i engelska.
  

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**.


* En kultur som präglas av närhet, samarbete och ett genuint kunskapsutbyte mellan kollegor
* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom data, AI och moderna dataplattformar – i uppdrag och genom tillgång till både lokala och globala kompetensnätverk

Ett team där du får arbeta nära andra specialister inom data, analys och AI, i uppdrag som gör verklig skillnad för kund och samhälle  
* 

**Ansökan**


*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.* *Just nu har vi semesterperiod och hoppas att även du njuter av en fin sommar. Vi ser framemot att läsa igenom din ansökan när vi är tillbaka från semester och förväntar oss att kunna återkoppla dig i augusti när vi är åter! Stort tack för ditt tålamod!*

  

**Om Sogeti**


Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini Group, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, gör teknologi enkelt och värdeskapande. Vi är specialiserade på AI-drivna lösningar inom quality engineering & testing, data och cloud och förvandlar snabbt idéer till handling. Sogeti levererar konkreta resultat, hjälper organisationer att innovera med självförtroende och skapar värde från dag ett. Vi är agila, snabbrörliga och drar nytta av starka partnerskap. Våra lokala team arbetar sida vid sida med våra kunder och bygger nära relationer genom att förstå deras verklighet. Tillsammans med Capgemini-koncernens globala styrka och branschexpertis skapar vi skalbara resultat.
  

***Right here. Right now.***| www.sogeti.se
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Senior Data Scientist – Forecasting, Solna
description:
I'm interested


Forecasting sits at the heart of how PostNord runs - every volume we plan for, every route we optimize, every shift we staff starts with a forecast. We're now strengthening our Forecasting team and looking for a Senior Data Scientist to be a central pillar in building something stronger.


This is a senior individual-contributor role. The team already has a Tech Lead and a Product Owner, so you won't be carrying out the roadmap or line management. Instead, your seniority shows up in the quality of your models, the judgement behind your decisions, and your ability to lift the people around you.


**Join us**

The Technology Acceleration area within Group IT is responsible for establishing the future IT landscape - the foundation for PostNord's continued AI- and data-driven journey. In the Forecasting team you'll combine deep machine learning craft with real business understanding to deliver forecasts that operations actually trust and act on, across the logistics domain.


You won't just build models. You'll help decide where forecasting creates the most value, what's worth improving, and what's better rebuilt from scratch.


**Job duties**

* Develop, improve, and maintain forecasting models for core logistics use cases - volumes, routes, staffing, and beyond.
* Evaluate what we already run and make pragmatic calls: optimize, replace, or redesign from the ground up.
* Get close to the operation - translate messy operational reality and business challenges into robust, scalable forecasting solutions.
* Ensure that the forecast holds up in production: data quality, feature engineering, and reconciling planning horizons and cadences.
* Collaborate with data engineers, domain teams, and the wider analytics community on our Databricks platform.
* Raise the bar around you - share knowledge, mentor colleagues, and help establish forecasting and model-lifecycle best practices.
* Communicate insight, trade-offs, and uncertainty clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
**Great Place to Work**
-----------------------

At PostNord, we value our employees and reward them with competitive salaries, great working conditions, and amazing benefits and discounts.


One of the benefits you can enjoy is joining The PostNord Plus personnel foundation, which offers you a wide range of activities and deals in holidays, sports, culture and wellness.


PostNord is a fantastic place to work and grow! We have a diverse and talented team of people who work in different roles and locations across the Nordic region.


We offer the prestigious PostNord Professionals program to help talented employees develop and prepare for senior roles


**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

* Extensive experience as a Data Scientist with a strong focus on machine learning and forecasting, and a track record of models running in production.
* Strong grounding in time-series modelling, statistical methods, and modern ML approaches.
* Strong programming skills in Python and SQL.
* Experience with modern data platforms - Databricks is highly relevant.
* A genuine ability to connect technical solutions to business impact, and the maturity to work hands-on while helping shape technical direction alongside the Tech Lead and Product Owner.
* Strong collaboration and communication skills.

**Meritorious experience**

* Experience in logistics, supply chain, or other operational forecasting domains - though we equally value strong forecasting craft brought in from any data-heavy domain.
* Probabilistic forecasting, hierarchical forecasting, or optimization.
* MLOps practices and model lifecycle management.
* Scaling models in cloud environments, preferably Azure.
* Experimentation frameworks and model evaluation techniques.
* Mentoring or informally leading other data scientists.
* Comfort working in an engineering organization that leans heavily on AI tooling to move faster.

**Language requirement**

Fluent English in speech and writing. Proficiency in at least one Scandinavian language is meritorious.  

  



**Why this role matters**

Better forecasts mean better decisions - fewer surprises in the network, smarter staffing, and capacity planned where it's needed. As a senior member of the team, you'll be a key reason our forecasting capability gets stronger, faster, and more trusted across the business.


**Your profile**

You're a senior, mature data scientist who pairs technical excellence with a strong business mindset. You're pragmatic - able to improve what exists and know when to start over. You're comfortable engaging directly with stakeholders, and you instinctively lift the people around you without needing a title to do it.


Most of all, you want to help build something stronger: a high-performing forecasting team that delivers real operational impact at scale.


**We offer**

* A cutting-edge analytics environment built on Databricks and Azure
* A central role in accelerating PostNord's AI- and data-driven journey
* The freedom to shape how forecasting is done at scale in a leading logistics company

**Apply**

Welcome with your application! We encourage you to apply as soon as possible, as we review applications on an ongoing basis. Please note that due to the summer holiday period, the earliest feedback will be provided in mid-August.


**Work with great people**
--------------------------

**Hannes Andersson**
Product Owner


"I had already been working with cross border mail at Arlanda so it was a natural step to further develop and understand the global logistics when jumping aboard Direct Link. The best thing about the role is that there’s so much going on at all time. As the global logistic market is constantly evolving, you need to be able to make quick and sound decisions and have really good communication. Another great thing is the cultural aspect which can be both challenging and rewarding when we’re practically doing business all around the world!"
**Åsa Edde**
Product Owner


"During my many years at PostNord, I have worked with development within the customer meeting area and the technology around it. As a Product Owner in the Analytics & Automation team, I can work with a long-term, strategic perspective and apply new technology to automate and streamline customer meetings and business processes among other things. New technology is changing the entire customer experience and our working methods. PostNord is really at the forefront of advanced, smart solutions. The culture is very innovative, which makes it very inspiring and satisfying to work here. We face the future with innovations. Automation is a very interesting area where I think we will see a rapid development in the future. Working here at PostNord with its history and as a company that so many people can relate to is both challenging and important. I really can´t imagine a more exciting and developing job."
PostNord offers communications and logistics solutions to, from and within the Nordic region. With our expertise and a unique distribution network, we are developing the basis for tomorrow’s communication, e-commerce, distribution and logistics.

  



**Accountable** 


We see the bigger picture and take ownership to continuously improve our business and systematically share best practices.
**Brave ❤**


By challenging current situations, we can prioritize effectively and focus on the things that matter the most. We lead a business that is in constant change.
**Committed** 


It is important that we listen, pursuing development and asking each other for feedback. Together we create an inclusive workplace where our people can thrive.
company_description: Ledande leverantören av kommunikation och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Genom vår expertis och ett starkt distributionsnät.

title: Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
At Aceve, we back the builders of society. Founded in the Nordics and growing across Europe, we build digital tools for the people who construct and maintain our physical world - giving electricians, plumbers, and contractors back their time, clarity, and confidence. With over 900 employees across 8 countries, leading brands in 7 customer markets, and more than €100M in revenue, we're on an ambitious growth journey, and we're just getting started. We're an AI-first company, and we work with grit, openness, and a good dose of joy.

**About the role**  

  

We're looking for a Marketing Automation Specialist who wants to help us architect the full customer lifecycle across our global markets.  

Working closely with our CRM & Insights Manager, you'll be a core partner in building the automation foundation that connects marketing and sales across the Nordics, Germany, and Benelux. You'll start by owning Sweden end-to-end — building the automations, programs, and standards that will become the global blueprint. You'll be able to trace your work directly to revenue — and you'll care about that.  

This is a role for someone who thrives at the intersection of strategy and execution. You think in customer journeys and you build them yourself — in Salesforce Account Engagement (Pardot), in Engagement Studio, in the Salesforce data model. You are the technical side, with a collaborative sparring partner alongside you. And you treat AI as a working layer across everything — not a separate workflow, but the default one.  

  

**What will you do?**

* Partner with Sales and commercial stakeholders on lead handoff criteria, upsell and cross-sell campaigns, and joint pipeline reviews — translating marketing data into language that lands in a sales context
* Architect and deploy AI agents — you don't just use AI, you build with it. Where rules-based automation stops, you design agents that take on the judgment calls: qualifying ambiguous leads, flagging data issues, summarising engagement signals for Sales. You know Agentforce foundations — how an agent reasons over Salesforce and Data Cloud, what actions it can take on a record, and where to put guardrails so it's safe to let loose.
* Put AI to work in the everyday. Operate tools like Claude to automate the unglamorous-but-critical: turning data into reporting insights, fixing broken flows and sync errors before they spread, and enriching records against the variables that matter to us. Equal parts builder and admin — you can stand something new up *and* quietly fix what's broken.
* Manage stakeholder relationships across marketing, sales, and regional teams — communicating campaign performance, getting alignment on scoring thresholds, and translating technical logic into business outcomes.
* Plan and execute email campaigns and nurture programs — writing copy with LLMs as standard and using AI to personalise sequences per ICP at a scale
* Build and evolve predictive lead scoring models or AI-driven personalisation at scale
* Build and maintain dynamic, behaviour-driven prospect lists using complex rule logic and predictive scoring signals, and own Engagement Studio programs end-to-end — from entry criteria and branching through to suppression and dynamic content
* Configure and troubleshoot the Salesforce <-> Account Engagement connector, including Marketing Data Sharing Rules that scope which records flow into each Business Unit, and resolve sync issues independently
* Own the full prospect lifecycle: form submission, list membership, completion actions, Lead/Contact creation in Salesforce, deduplication, and automation rules that score leads, update fields, and route prospects to Sales — applying AI-powered enrichment tools (Clay, Apollo, Clearbit) to sharpen data quality and scoring accuracy from entry
* Manage Connected Campaigns and track performance through first-touch, last-touch, and multi-touch attribution , using AI to flag underperforming segments early

**We believe you have**

* Proven, hands-on experience in B2B Marketing Automation platforms (Salesforce Account Engagement (Pardot, Marketo, Eloqua) — real build experience you can walk us through, not adjacent tools or exposure
* A commercial mindset — you track your work to pipeline and revenue, not just opens and clicks.
* Strong understanding of the Salesforce data model and how data flows between Salesforce and AE, including Connected Campaigns, Campaign Influence reporting, and Multi-Business Unit setups with Marketing Data Sharing Rules
* Experience building dynamic lists with complex nested rule logic — Page Actions, Custom Redirects, progressive profiling, and Scoring & Grading
* A genuine AI-first working style — you use LLMs for copy, segmentation, and campaign planning as a matter of course, and you're hands-on with enrichment and intent platforms (Clay, Apollo, Clearbit, Bombora, 6sense or similar); this is how you work, not something you've explored
* Fluent English, written and spoken
* GDPR/PECR basics, double opt-in, and preference center experience

 **Bonus Points For**

* Pre-send QA with Litmus or Email on Acid; SPF/DKIM/DMARC awareness
* UTM taxonomy and asset-foldering hygiene
* HTML proficiency for editing email templates; basic CMS/WordPress for embedding AE forms; GA4 event validation

**Not ticking every box?** No worries! We value potential and drive, so apply anyway or connect with us- you might be just what we're looking for in our growing organisation! Join Aceve and take your expertise to the next level, together we are redefining what’s possible in craft and construction solutions!

 *Aceve is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our selection process is conducted continuously and without discrimination, ensuring an equal opportunity for all candidates.*

title: Receptionister för natt- och dagpass med erfarenhet från Opera, MEWS & HMS
description:
**Om jobbet:** Receptionist på varierande arbetsplatser i Stockholm. Vi bemannar Stockholms mest attraktiva hotell med alltifrån enstaka pass till längre uppdrag. Arbeta när det passar dig och på den arbetsplats du trivs bäst. Arbetet varierar om du arbetar själv på hotellet eller med kollegor. Tjänsten passar dig som vill kombinera med studier eller annat arbete.
  
Vem är du? Är du en nattuggla som trivs bäst när alla andra sover? Arbetar du kanske redan på ett hotell som nattreceptionist men vill arbeta extra under din lediga vecka? Eller vill du jobba några extra pass dagtid?
  
Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet från hotellreception och känner dig trygg med något av följande bokningssystem: Opera, Opera Cloud, Mews, Hotsoft, HMS. Som person ser vi att du är flexibel, serviceminded och ordningsam. Du behöver kunna kommunicera obehindrat på engelska i tal och skrift. Varför ska du jobba på RA Hospitality? Att jobba hos oss är framförallt väldigt roligt! Vem vill inte ha hundratals härliga kollegor och möjlighet att jobba på massor av spännande arbetsplatser?
  
Erfarenhet - Hos oss får du snabbt erfarenheter som annars tar flera år att uppnå. Jobba på allt från en till 30 olika arbetsplatser, hos oss finns alla möjligheter! Lär känna nya branschkollegor och skaffa dig ett brett nätverk i branschen!
  
Flexibelt schema - Jobba eller vara ledig? Hos oss får du sms-förfrågningar och väljer själv hur mycket, när och vart du vill jobba. Vi erbjuder både heltid, deltid och extraanställningar!
  
Personalaktiviteter - Få vänner för livet! Vi hittar på massa kul tillsammans för att stärka gemenskapen och visa vår uppskattning.
  
️‍ ️ Friskvård och förmåner – Vi erbjuder alla våra anställda oavsett anställningsgrad rabatterade träningskort. Vi erbjuder även rabatt på hotellvistelser i hela Norden!
  
Utbildning - Flera gånger per år anordnar vi utbildningar på olika nivåer. Vi har också ett samarbete med externa parter, bl.a. Restaurangakademien.
  
Trygga och bra villkor med kollektivavtal - Hos oss ingår allt, försäkring, pension och semesterersättning. Dessutom så får du en konkurrenskraftig lön samt tillägg för obekväma arbetstider.
  
Mer om oss RA Hospitality är Nordens ledande bemanningsföretag inom besöksnäringen. Vi har funnits i över 20 år och har kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö och Oslo. Vi bemannar, rekryterar och outsourcar personal till hotellkedjor, stjärnkrogar, företagsrestauranger, kommuner, konferensanläggningar, cateringföretag och stora Arenor.
  
Våra ledord är effektivitet, kvalitet, flexibilitet och omtanke.
  
Öppen för alla
  
Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.

title: SOC Analyst
description:
We are looking for a **SOC Analyst** to join us at Telia Cygate.


My name is **Martin Spiik** , Head of Security Services, and I’m looking for someone who wants to grow together with us. We are a supportive and forward-looking team focused on helping our customers detect, understand, and respond to cyber threats through advanced security monitoring and incident response.


**What you’ll do:**

As a Security Analyst in our Security Operations Center (SOC), you will play a key role in protecting our customers against cyber threats. You will work closely with a national team of security specialists, analyzing security events, investigating suspicious activity, and improving our ability to detect and respond to attacks.


In this role, you will also be part of our Incident Response Team (IRT), including participation in an on-call duty outside regular working hours.


You will:


* Identify, prioritize, and manage security events and incidents
* Assess new vulnerabilities and recommend appropriate mitigation actions
* Contribute to development and improving detection rules, use cases, and analytical methods
* Understand the threat landscape facing our customers and identify potential attacker behaviors
* Be responsible for a handful of customers where you participate in customer meetings, present security findings and reports, and contribute to strengthening their cyber resilience

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

You are curious about how attacks work and enjoy understanding systems at a deep technical level. You approach challenges analytically, base decisions on facts, and are not afraid to ask questions, challenge old ways of working, and contribute with new ideas that help the team move forward.


We believe you have:


* Previous experience working in a SOC, CSIRT, or CERT environment
* Experience analyzing network logs from tools such as Zeek and Suricata
* Knowledge of security monitoring, threat detection, and digital forensics in Windows and Linux environments
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Excellent communication skills, with fluency in **Swedish (native or near-native)** and **good English**

**Why Telia Cygate?**

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Interested? Apply!**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-07-31.** Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Flexible within Sweden, within commuting distance of one of Telia Cygate's office locations .


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner.**  

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Please note that this role requires **Swedish citizenship** due to security requirements.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to **Martin Spiik** at **martin.spiik@cygate.se** .


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Senior Nätverkskonsult / Arkitekt
description:
Hej! Ja du! Tröttnat lite på din nuvarande roll? Saknar du att ha kul och spännande utmaningar? Har du erfarenhet av nätverks och säkerhetslösningar ja då har du kommit rätt. Motiveras du av att få jobba med stora och spännande lösningar där ditt jobb gör skillnad? Då vill jag lära känna dig!


Jag heter Stefan Kärnestad och jag ansvarar för vårt fantastiska konsulteam **Networking & Security i region Norr.** Jag söker dig som vill arbeta i rollen som Senior Nätverkskonsult/arkitekt och vara med på en spännande IT-resa tillsammans med våra kunder. Har du erfarenhet av Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet och vill utvecklas tillsammans med ett kompetent och familjärt gäng av konsulter? Då tror jag att du kommer att trivas hos oss på Telia Cygate.


**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen**

Som Senior Nätverkskonsult/arkitekt får du utmana dig själv genom att jobba med det senaste inom design av olika nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar till installation, konfiguration, automation och felsökning i våra riktigt stora kunders IT-miljöer.


Våra kund- och leveransprojekt spänner ofta över flera tjänsteområden vilket innebär att du kommer få arbeta tillsammans med andra specialister inom våra tre fokusområden, nätverk, säkerhet och hybrid IT. Du hjälper kunden att hitta den mest optimala lösningen för dem samtidigt som du får en djupare insikt och ny inspiration i allt från Cloud, Security, Automation, On-prem, och de senaste kombinationerna där emellan. Vad kan vara roligare än det? I takt med att du utvecklas så ser vi gärna att du certifierar dig så att du får bevis på dina framgångar


* **Hjälpa och utveckla kunden** att förverkliga sina mål med en modern infrastruktur – bli guiden!
* **Design** av kundens nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar på olika nivåer.
* **Installation, konfiguration och felsökning** i komplexa IT-miljöer hos stora kunder.
* **Självständigt arbete** , med mycket kundkontakt.

**För att lyckas i rollen**

Som person gillar du utmaningar, att skapa förändring och har en förmåga att engagera kunder såväl som dina kollegor. Du kommer särskilt till din rätt när du får ge utlopp för tankar och idéer där du använder din förståelse för att omsätta krav till genomförbara lösningar. Förutom det får du tillhöra en växande organisation som stöttar dig på din egen utvecklingsresa; varför inte certifiera dig med oss och utforska det senaste hos våra leverantörer.


* **Tidigare erfarenhet** inom Nätverksinfrastruktur inom Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet
* **Certifiering** inom Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet ses som starkt meriterande.
* **Goda kunskaper** inom Routing och Switching.
* **Flytande svenska och engelska** , i både tal och skrift.
* **Svensk medborgare**

**Varför Telia Cygate?**

På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.


Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.


Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan!  

  



**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**  

Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.  

  



**Vad vi erbjuder**  

När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.


**Låter det intressant?**

Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast 2026-08-31. Återkoppling kommer dröja under ansökningstiden.  

  



Placeringsort: Sundsvall, Umeå, Skellefteå eller Luleå


Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår Talent Acquisition Partner. Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.


Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta mig, Stefan Kärnestad på stefan.karnestad@cygate.se


I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.


**Lika möjligheter för alla**

På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.  

  



**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**
